---
title: "Match Day 21 Dashboard"
author: "Dr Phil Barter"
format: 
  dashboard:
      scrolling: true
      logo: https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/2266chgj5oaes70zou2wv/UP-Logo-small.png?rlkey=9bqiw2rbdfhn9x51mlgsfujpp&dl=0
      nav-buttons: 
                  - icon: github
                    href: https://github.com/Barts78
                  - icon: linkedin
                    href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/phil-barter-55500122/
                  - icon: twitter
                    href: https://twitter.com/Barts78
                    
      theme: 
       - journal
       - custom.scss

---

# Line Up

``` {r, echo:FALSE, messages:FALSE, warnings:FALSE}
#| output: false
#print('this produces some outout')
# run_project.R
library(tidyverse)
library(shiny)
library(gifski)
library(magick)
library(systemfonts)
library(sysfonts)
library(fontawesome)
library(glue)
library(worldfootballR)
library(gganimate)
library(ggsoccer)
library(viridis)
library(paletteer)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggpointdensity)
library(ggthemes)
library(ggtext)
library(ggiraph)
library(ggiraphExtra)
library(ggimage)
library(gtExtras)
library(grid)
library(ggdensity)
library(treemapify)
library(magick)
library(ggpubr)
library(cowplot)
library(readxl)
library(writexl)
library(gt)
library(webshot2)
library(chromote)
library(ggrepel)
library(png)
library(patchwork)
library(plotly)
library(reshape)
library(psych)
library(ggshakeR)
library(xtable)
library(tidyquant)
library(gfonts)
library(extrafont)
library(extrafontdb)
library(ggnewscale)
library(stringr)
library(flextable)



#set logo
get_png <- function(filename) {
  grid::rasterGrob(png::readPNG(filename), interpolate = TRUE)
}

#load logos
AI_Logo <- image_read("~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/Icons/UP logo.png")
logo_AI <- image_read("~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/Icons/UP logo.png")
Soccerball  <- image_read("~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/Icons/ball1.png")
Football  <- image_read("~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/Icons/ball2.png")


#load fonts
#set fonts
font_add_google("Geostar", "Geostar")
font_add("Awesome", regular = "/Library/Fonts/Font Awesome 6 Brands-Regular-400.otf")


# change per game to match kits
#set Waves titles
WavesTitle_text <- paste0(
  'Attacking Waves (', 
  '<span style="color:green4"> **Touches** </span>',
  ',',
  '<span style="color:white"> **Passes** </span>',
  ',',
  '<span style="color:green3"> **Shots** </span>',
  '), ')

OppoWavesTitle_text <- paste0(
  'Attacking Waves (', 
  '<span style="color:red3"> **Touches** </span>',
  ',',
  '<span style="color:white"> **Passes** </span>',
  ',',
  '<span style="color:green3"> **Shots** </span>',
  '), ')


#set xg line titles 
xGlineTitle_text <- paste0(
  '(', 
  '<span style="color:green4"> **Xg** </span>',
  ',',
  '<span style="color:green4"> **NPxG Dashed** </span>',
  ',',
  '<span style="color:gray"> **xGOT** </span>',
  '), development')

OppoxGlineTitle_text <- paste0(
  '(', 
  '<span style="color:red3"> **Xg** </span>',
  ',',
  '<span style="color:red3"> **NPxG Dashed** </span>',
  ',',
  '<span style="color:gray"> **xGOT** </span>',
  '), development')


#set dribbles title
DribblesTitle_text <- paste0(
  'Dribbles (', 
  '<span style="color:#BD1100"> **Unsuccessful** </span>',
  'and',
  '<span style="color:#4A8C1C"> **Successful** </span>','), ')

#set duels title
DuelsTitle_text <- paste0(
  'Duels (', 
  '<span style="color:#BD1100"> **Unsuccessful** </span>',
  'and',
  '<span style="color:#4A8C1C"> **Successful** </span>',
  '), ')

#social caption with X
socialx <- paste0('<span style="font-family:\'Geostar\', Arial, sans-serif;color:#151515;font-size:12px;">X</span>',
                  '<span style="color:#FFF9FB;font-size:12px;">.</span>',
                  '<span style="font-family:sans-serif;color:#16425B;font-size:12px;">@Barts78</span>',
                  '<span style="color:#FFF9FB;font-size:12px;">.</span>',
                  '<span style="font-family:\'Font Awesome 6 Brands\', Arial, sans-serif;color:#104E8B;font-size:12px;">&#xf08c;</span>',
                  '<span style="color:#FFF9FB;font-size:12px;">.</span>',
                  '<span style="font-family:sans-serif;color:#16425B;font-size:12px;">phil-barter</span>',
                  '<span style="color:#FFF9FB;font-size:12px;">.</span>',
                  '<span style="font-family:\'Font Awesome 6 Brands\', Arial, sans-serif;color:#151515;font-size:12px;">&#xF4F6;</span>',
                  '<span style="color:#FFF9FB;font-size:12px;">.</span>',
                  '<span style="font-family:sans-serif;color:#16425B;font-size:12px;">@DrBarts</span>')

##new socials
social_caption <- function(twitter="@Barts78",
                           github = "Barts78",
                           linkedin= "Phil-barter",
                           mastodon= "@DrBarts",
                           threads = "Barts78",
                           data = "OPTA",
                           icon_color="black",
                           font_color="#454545",
                           bg_color="white",
                           font_family="sans-serif"){
  
  icons = list(
    twitter = "&#xe61a",
    github = "&#xf09b",
    linkedin = "&#xf08c",
    mastodon = "&#xf4f6",
    threads = "&#xe618",
    data = "&#xf16b"
  )   
  
  social = list(threads = threads, linkedin = linkedin, twitter = twitter, mastodon = mastodon, github = github, data = data)
  social = social[!is.na(social)]
  
  caption = ""
  for (name in names(social)) {
    icon = icons[name]
    info = social[name]
    html = glue("<span style='font-family:\"Font Awesome 6 Brands\";color:{icon_color};font-size:12px;'>{icon};</span>
                <span style='color:{bg_color};font-size:10px;'>.</span>
                <span style='font-family:{font_family};color:{font_color};font-size:10px;'>{info}</span>
                <span style='color:{bg_color};font-size:10px;'>.</span>")
    
    
    caption = paste0(caption,html)
  }
  
  caption
}

#create social caption
my_socials <- social_caption(twitter = "@Barts78",
                             github = "Barts78",
                             linkedin = "Phil-barter",
                             mastodon = "@DrBarts",
                             threads = NA,
                             data = "OPTA",
                             icon_color = "#454545",
                             font_color = "#454545",
                             bg_color = "white",
                             font_family = "sans-serif")

my_datasource <- paste0('<span style="font-family:\'Font Awesome 6 Free\', Arial, sans-serif;color:#454545;font-size:12px;">&#x1F4BE;</span>',
                        '<span style="color:#FFF9FB;font-size:10px;">...</span>',
                        '<span style="font-family:sans-serif;color:#454545;font-size:10px;">OPTA</span>',
                        '<span style="color:#FFF9FB;font-size:10px;">...</span>')

My_caption <- paste0(my_socials)

#set home
Match_LFC <- paste("Liverpool")

#set oppo
Match_Oppo <- paste("Bournemouth")

#set oppo color
Color_Oppo <- paste("red3")

#set Home color
Color_LFC <- paste("green4")

#set home color scale
ColorScale_Home <- paste("ggsci::teal_material")

#set away color scale
ColorScale_Away <- paste("ggsci::red_material")

#set home color scale con
ColorScale_HomeC <- paste("ggthemes::Green")

#set away color scale con
ColorScale_AwayC <- paste("ggthemes::Classic Red")

#set match date
Game_date <- paste("21-01-24")

#set data type (EPL opta and Understat, CL opta, Fa cup Opta)
Data_type <- paste("(Opta data)")

#set LFC h/a
LFCHA <- paste("Away")

#set oppo h/a
OppoHA <- paste("Home") 

#set fixture
Match_Fixture <- paste0(Match_LFC, " vs ", Match_Oppo, " (a) ", Game_date)

#set dashboard fixture
Match_Fixture_Dash <- paste0(Match_LFC, " vs ", Match_Oppo, " (a) ", Game_date)

#set  UnderStat match ID
MatchIdUS <- 22102 #check

#Set Fotmob Match ID
MatchIdFotmob <- 4193731 #check

#set Fotmob LFC / home team ID
LFCIdFotmob <- 8650

#set Fotmob Oppo team ID
OppoIdFotmob <- 8678

#set fbref match page
MatchIdFbref <- paste("https://fbref.com/en/matches/9a03e25c/Bournemouth-Liverpool-January-21-2024-Premier-League") #check

#set Game name
GameName <- paste("BAFC_vs_LFC")

GameWeek <- paste("MD21")

#set Game name PLayers
GameNamePlayers <- paste("BAFC_vs_LFC_players")

#CHECK
#set first sub time (min before sub)
firstSub <- 63

#set second sub time (min before sub)
secondSub <- 82

#set third sub time (min before sub)
thirdSub <- 89

#oppo first sub
firstSubOppo <- 54

#seet pk timte
PKTime <- 00

#redcard (min before)
redcard <- 00

#redcard (min before)
redcard2 <- 00

#load in main data 
fileName <- paste0("~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/Data Sets/WhoScored/EPL Games/Processed Games/", GameName, ".xlsx")
plottingData <- read_xlsx(fileName)

#set summary values
Total_EPV <- sum(plottingData$Cumalative_EPV)
GameTime <- max(plottingData$expandedMinute)
OutofPlayTime <- round(sum(plottingData$Out_of_play_time)/60,2)
InPlayTime <- round(sum(plottingData$In_play_time)/60,2)
Possession <- round(sum(plottingData$Touches),2)
HomePossession <- round((((sum(plottingData$Touches == 1 & plottingData$teamId == Match_LFC))/Possession)*100),2)
OppoPossession <- round((((sum(plottingData$Touches == 1 & plottingData$teamId == Match_Oppo))/Possession)*100),2)
HomeEPV <- round(sum(plottingData$EPVvalue[plottingData$teamId == Match_LFC & plottingData$`outcomeType/value` == 1]),2)
OppoEPV <- round(sum(plottingData$EPVvalue[plottingData$teamId == Match_Oppo & plottingData$`outcomeType/value` == 1]),2)
HomeEPVA <- round(sum(plottingData$TeamEPV[plottingData$teamId == Match_LFC & plottingData$`outcomeType/value` == 1]),2)
OppoEPVA <- round(sum(plottingData$TeamEPV[plottingData$teamId == Match_Oppo & plottingData$`outcomeType/value` == 1]),2)
HomexG <- round(sum(plottingData$xG[plottingData$teamId == Match_LFC]),2)
OppoxG <- round(sum(plottingData$xG[plottingData$teamId == Match_Oppo]),2)
HomeNPxG <- round(sum(plottingData$NPxG[plottingData$teamId == Match_LFC]),2)
OppoNPxG <- round(sum(plottingData$NPxG[plottingData$teamId == Match_Oppo]),2)
HomeBCs <- round(sum(plottingData$BCs[plottingData$teamId == Match_LFC]),0)
OppoBCs <- round(sum(plottingData$BCs[plottingData$teamId == Match_Oppo]),0)

# setup data frame from main variables above for summary tables
PossessionTable <- data.frame(
  teamId = c(Match_LFC, Match_Oppo),
  Possession = c(HomePossession, OppoPossession)
)

PossessionTable <- PossessionTable %>%
  mutate(Possession = round(Possession,2))
          
EPVTable <- data.frame(
  teamId = c(Match_LFC, Match_Oppo),
  EPV = c(HomeEPV, OppoEPV)
)

EPVTable <- EPVTable %>%
  mutate(EPV = round(EPV,2))

#load Fotmob data

MD_logos <- fotmob_get_match_players(MatchIdFotmob)
MD_logos <- MD_logos %>%
 unite(Player, first_name, last_name, sep = " ", remove = FALSE, na.rm = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(Player = str_trim(Player))


#load fbref Data

#get data by setting url frm fbref.com
Liverpool_url <- "https://fbref.com/en/squads/822bd0ba/Liverpool-Stats"


#downlaod data & write to excel
Liverpool_Defensive_logs <- fb_team_match_log_stats(team_urls = Liverpool_url, stat_type = "defense")
write_xlsx(Liverpool_Defensive_logs, "~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/data sets/fbref/LFC_defence_EPL2324.xlsx")

Liverpool_passing_logs <- fb_team_match_log_stats(team_urls = Liverpool_url, stat_type = "passing")
write_xlsx(Liverpool_passing_logs, "~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/data sets/fbref/LFC_passing_EPL2324.xlsx")

Liverpool_passing_types_logs <- fb_team_match_log_stats(team_urls = Liverpool_url, stat_type = "passing_types")
write_xlsx(Liverpool_passing_types_logs, "~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/data sets/fbref/LFC_passing_types_EPL2324.xlsx")

Liverpool_gca_logs <- fb_team_match_log_stats(team_urls = Liverpool_url, stat_type = "gca")
write_xlsx(Liverpool_gca_logs, "~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/data sets/fbref/LFC_gca_EPL2324.xlsx")

Liverpool_shooting_logs <- fb_team_match_log_stats(team_urls = Liverpool_url, stat_type = "shooting")
write_xlsx(Liverpool_shooting_logs, "~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/data sets/fbref/LFC_shooting_EPL2324.xlsx")

Liverpool_Misc_logs <- fb_team_match_log_stats(team_urls = Liverpool_url, stat_type = "misc")
write_xlsx(Liverpool_Misc_logs, "~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/data sets/fbref/LFC_Misc_EPL2324.xlsx")

#Advanced Fbref stats for table
FbrefMatchUrls2324 <- fb_match_urls(country = "ENG", gender = "M", season_end_year = 2024, tier = "1st")
LFC_url <- MatchIdFbref #-check

MD_passing <- fb_advanced_match_stats(match_url = LFC_url,stat_type = "passing",team_or_player = "Player")

MD_possession <- fb_advanced_match_stats(match_url = LFC_url,stat_type = "possession",team_or_player = "Player", time_pause = 3)

MD_defense <- fb_advanced_match_stats(match_url = LFC_url,stat_type = "defense", team_or_player = "Player", time_pause = 3)

MD_misc <- fb_advanced_match_stats(match_url = LFC_url,stat_type = "misc", team_or_player = "Player", time_pause = 3)

MD_summary <- fb_advanced_match_stats(match_url = LFC_url,stat_type = "summary", team_or_player = "Player", time_pause = 3) 

MD_shots <- fb_match_shooting(match_url = LFC_url)

MD_lineups <- fb_match_lineups(match_url = LFC_url)

MD_MatchReport <- fb_match_report(match_url = LFC_url, time_pause = 3)

MD_shots <- fb_match_shooting(match_url = LFC_url)


```

## Row 1

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
files <- list.files(path = "~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/UP Pod Prep 2324/Match day 21/viz pack/",
                    pattern = "*.png",
                    full.names = TRUE) ## A cheeky one-liner
files <- files[order(file.info(files)$mtime, decreasing = FALSE)]
```

  
```{r, echo=FALSE, results = "asis"}
lineup <- list.files(path = "~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/UP Pod Prep 2324/Match day 21/viz pack/Line up/",
                    pattern = "*.png",
                    full.names = TRUE) ## A cheeky one-liner
lineup <- lineup[order(file.info(lineup)$ctime, decreasing = FALSE)]

for (file in lineup) {
  cat("", "\n")
  cat("![](",file,")", "\n")
  cat("\n")
  caption <- paste0("**Caption:** ", tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file)), "\n")
  cat(caption)
  cat("", "\n")
  cat("\n")
  cat("\n")
}
```

# Match Summary

## Row 1 {height = "25%"}

``` {r summary table}
#|height: 25%
#posession and goals by team
MatchSummaryData <- plottingData %>%
  mutate(Successful_Touch = ifelse(isTouch == "TRUE", 1, 0)) %>%
  group_by(teamId) %>% 
  summarise_at(vars(Goals, In_play_time, Touches, PK_Box_Touches, Attacking_Half_Touches, Defensive_Half_Touches, TotalShots, OFShots, OTShots, SixYard_Box_Shots, PK_Box_Shots, Out_Box_Shots, xG, NPxG, xGOT, Attempted_Passes, Successful_Passes, Long_Passes, Successful_Long_Passes, BCs, Corners, Short_Corners), list(sum), na.rm = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(In_play_time = round((In_play_time/60),1),
         Pass_Success = round((Successful_Passes/Attempted_Passes)*100,1),
         Long_Pass_Success = round((Successful_Long_Passes/Long_Passes)*100,1)) %>%
  na.omit() 

MatchSummaryData <- MatchSummaryData %>%
  left_join(PossessionTable, by = c("teamId" = "teamId"), copy = TRUE) %>%
  left_join(EPVTable, by = c("teamId" = "teamId"), copy = TRUE) %>%
  mutate('EPV % Con.' = round((xG/EPV)*100,1))

MatchSummaryData <- MatchSummaryData %>%
  select('Team' = teamId, 'Possession %' = Possession, 'On Ball Time' = In_play_time, Touches, 'Total Shots' = TotalShots, 'OFT Shots' = OFShots, 'OT Shots' = OTShots, '6yrd box Shots' = SixYard_Box_Shots, 'PK Box Shots' = PK_Box_Shots, 'Outside Box Shots' = Out_Box_Shots, BCs, Goals, xG, NPxG, xGOT, EPV, 'EPV % Con.', 'Attempted Passes' = Attempted_Passes, 'Successful Passes' = Successful_Passes, 'Pass Success %' = Pass_Success)

MatchSummaryTable <- MatchSummaryData %>%
  gt(groupname_col = "Team") %>%
  cols_align(align = "right", columns = everything()) %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md("**Match Summary**"),
    subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture)) %>%
  tab_source_note(md(My_caption)) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(3, 13:16),
    decimals = 2
  ) %>%
  fmt_percent(
    columns = c(2, 17, 20),
    decimals = 1,
    scale_values = FALSE
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = Color_LFC),
    locations = cells_row_groups(groups = Match_LFC)) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = Color_Oppo),
    locations = cells_row_groups(groups = Match_Oppo)) %>%
  tab_options(
    heading.padding = px(1),
    heading.align = "left",
    column_labels.background.color = "#E5E5E5",
    row_group.background.color = "#B22222",
    stub.background.color = "#E5E5E5",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "black",
    summary_row.background.color = "#E5E5E5",
    table.font.size = 14,
    heading.title.font.size = 16,
    heading.subtitle.font.size = 14,
    source_notes.font.size = 8,
    table.width = "100%") %>%
  tab_style(locations = cells_title(groups = "title"),style = list(cell_text(weight = "bold", size = 16))) 

MatchSummaryTable
```
## Row 2 
``` {r summary by period}  

#possession and goals by time period
MatchSummaryPeriodData <- plottingData %>%
  mutate(Successful_Touch = ifelse(isTouch == "TRUE", 1, 0)) %>%
  mutate(TeamEPV = ifelse(str_detect(`outcomeType/value`, "1"), paste0(EPVvalue), 0),
         TeamEPV = as.numeric(TeamEPV)) %>%
  group_by(Game_Period, teamId) %>% 
  summarise_at(vars(Goals, In_play_time, Touches, TotalShots, OFShots, OTShots, SixYard_Box_Shots, PK_Box_Shots, Out_Box_Shots, BCs, xG, NPxG, xGOT, Attempted_Passes, Successful_Passes, TeamEPV), list(sum), na.rm = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(In_play_time = round((In_play_time/60),1),
         Pass_Success = round((Successful_Passes/Attempted_Passes)*100,1),
         'EPV % Con.' = round((xG/TeamEPV)*100,1),
         Possession = round((Touches/(sum(Touches)))*100,1)) %>%
  na.omit() 

MatchSummaryPeriodData <- MatchSummaryPeriodData %>%
  select('Time Period' = Game_Period, 'Team' = teamId, 'Possession %' = Possession, 'On Ball Time' = In_play_time, Touches, 'Total Shots' = TotalShots, 'OFT Shots' = OFShots, 'OT Shots' = OTShots, '6yrd box Shots' = SixYard_Box_Shots, 'PK Box Shots' = PK_Box_Shots, 'Outside Box Shots' = Out_Box_Shots, BCs, Goals, xG, NPxG, xGOT, EPV = TeamEPV, 'EPV % Con.', 'Attempted Passes' = Attempted_Passes, 'Successful Passes' = Successful_Passes, 'Pass Success %' = Pass_Success)

MatchSummaryPeriodTable <- MatchSummaryPeriodData %>%
  gt(rowname_col = "Team", groupname_col = "Time Period") %>%
  cols_align(align = "right", columns = everything()) %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md("Match Details"),
    subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture)) %>%
  tab_source_note(md(My_caption)) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(4, 14:17),
    decimals = 2
  ) %>%
  fmt_percent(
    columns = c(3, 18, 21),
    decimals = 1,
    scale_values = FALSE
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Possession", columns = c(3:5)) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Shots", columns = c(6:16)) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Passes", columns = c(17:21)) %>%
  tab_style(
    locations = cells_column_spanners('Possession'),
    style = list(cell_text(weight = "bold", size = 16))) %>%
  tab_style(
    locations = cells_column_spanners('Shots'),
    style = list(cell_text(weight = "bold", size = 16))) %>%
  tab_style(
    locations = cells_column_spanners('Passes'),
    style = list(cell_text(weight = "bold", size = 16))) %>%
  tab_style(
    locations = cells_row_groups(groups = c("0 - 15", "16 - 30", "31 - 45", "46 - 60", "61 - 75", "76 - 90", "90 +")),
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold", size = 16, color = "white")) %>%
  tab_style(
    locations = cells_stub( rows = c(1, 3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13)),
    style = list(cell_fill(color = Color_Oppo),
                 cell_text(size = 16, color = "white"))) %>%
  tab_style(
    locations = cells_stub( rows = c(2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14)),
    style = list(cell_fill(color = Color_LFC),
                cell_text(size = 16, color = "white"))) %>%
  tab_style(
    locations = cells_title(groups = "title"),
    style = list(cell_text(weight = "bold", size = 16))) %>%
  tab_options(
    heading.padding = px(1),
    heading.align = "left",
    column_labels.background.color = "#E5E5E5",
    row_group.background.color = "ivory4",
    stub.background.color = "#E5E5E5",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "black",
    summary_row.background.color = "#E5E5E5",
    table.font.size = 14,
    heading.title.font.size = 16,
    heading.subtitle.font.size = 14,
    source_notes.font.size = 8,
    table.width = "100%")

MatchSummaryPeriodTable

```
## Row 3 {height = "50%"}

``` {r Match MC}
#|height: 50%
#Load data (opta Data)
dashboard_data <- plottingData

#Dashboard data wrangling all data
dashboard_data <- dashboard_data %>%
  filter(teamId == Match_LFC) %>%
  filter(TotalShots == 1) %>%
  filter(!situation == "NA") %>%
  mutate(TotalxG = cumsum(xG)) %>%
  mutate(TotalNPxG = cumsum(NPxG)) %>%
  mutate(TotalxGOT = cumsum(xGOT)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_X = ifelse(str_detect(Goals, "1"), paste0(expandedMinute), NA)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_Y = ifelse(str_detect(Goals, "1"), paste0(TotalxG), NA)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_X = as.numeric(Goal_point_X)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_Y = as.numeric(Goal_point_Y)) %>%
  select(x, y, Goal_point_Y, Goal_point_X, TotalxG, TotalNPxG, TotalxGOT, situation, teamId, TotalShots, xG, NPxG, xGOT, expandedMinute, type)

#Oppo dashboard
#Load data (Understat Data)
Oppodashboard_data <- plottingData

Oppodashboard_data <- Oppodashboard_data %>%
  filter(teamId == Match_Oppo) %>%
  filter(TotalShots == 1) %>%
  filter(!situation == "NA") %>%
  mutate(TotalxG = cumsum(xG)) %>%
  mutate(TotalNPxG = cumsum(NPxG)) %>%
  mutate(TotalxGOT = cumsum(xGOT)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_X = ifelse(str_detect(Goals, "1"), paste0(expandedMinute), NA)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_Y = ifelse(str_detect(Goals, "1"), paste0(TotalxG), NA)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_X = as.numeric(Goal_point_X)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_Y = as.numeric(Goal_point_Y)) %>%
  select(x, y, Goal_point_Y, Goal_point_X, TotalxG, TotalNPxG, TotalxGOT, situation, teamId, TotalShots, xG, NPxG, xGOT, expandedMinute, type)



#Matchday MC
HomexGMC <- HomeShots <- dashboard_data %>%
  select(xG)
AwayxGMC <- AwayShots <- Oppodashboard_data %>%
  select(xG)

HomeTotalGoals <- sum(!is.na(ifelse(dashboard_data$type == "Goal", 1, NA)))
AwayTotalGoals <- sum(!is.na(ifelse(Oppodashboard_data$type == "Goal", 1, NA)))

# Set up for monte carlo --------------------------------------------------

#Goals Against
set.seed(1111) # if you set the same seed, you will get the same output

runs = 1000; # change based on how many simulation runs you want

AwayxGMC_output <- numeric(runs) # makes a vector to put data in (good practice for when you start building really big simulations)

#Goals for
set.seed(1111) # if you set the same seed, you will get the same output

runs = 1000; # change based on how many simulation runs you want

HomexGMC_output <- numeric(runs)


# monte carlo simulation --------------------------------------------------

#goals Away team
for (i in 1:runs) {
  temp_game <- sapply(AwayxGMC$xG, function(x) rbinom(1,1,x)) # apply applies the function to each row, and gives backs the output as a vector
  AwayxGMC_output[i] <- sum(temp_game)
}

# proportion of certain goals -------------------------------------------- (overall 17 ga, 28g, home 21g 8 ga, away 7g 9 ga)

goals <- AwayTotalGoals # set number of goals you want proportion for

number_goals <- sum(AwayxGMC_output == goals) # number of times those goals were "scored" out of the number of runs

at_least_goals <- sum(AwayxGMC_output >= goals) # at least that many goals

#table(AwayxGMC_output)


# monte carlo simulation --------------------------------------------------
#Goals Home
for (i in 1:runs) {
  temp_game <- sapply(HomexGMC$xG, function(x) rbinom(1,1,x)) # apply applies the function to each row, and gives backs the output as a vector
  HomexGMC_output[i] <- sum(temp_game)
}

# proportion of certain goals -------------------------------------------- (use totals for block)

goals <- HomeTotalGoals # set number of goals you want proportion for

number_goals <- sum(HomexGMC_output == goals) # number of times those goals were "scored" out of the number of runs

at_least_goals <- sum(HomexGMC_output >= goals) # at least that many goals

#table(HomexGMC_output)


# create data frame from the MC output, so converting vector into data frame
MC_output <- data.frame(HomexGMC_output, AwayxGMC_output)

MD_MC <- MC_output %>%
  select(Home = HomexGMC_output, Away = AwayxGMC_output)


prob_matrix <- table(MD_MC$Home, MD_MC$Away) / runs


# Assuming you have the 'prob_matrix' from the previous example

# Convert probability matrix to long format for ggplot
long_prob_matrix <- as.data.frame(as.table(prob_matrix))
colnames(long_prob_matrix) <- c("Home", "Away", "Probability")

long_prob_matrix <- long_prob_matrix %>%
  mutate(Probability = round(Probability, 2)*100)

# Create a ggplot tiled plot
MD_MC_Plot <- ggplot(long_prob_matrix, aes(x = Home, y = Away, fill = Probability)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste(Probability, "%")), size = 4, color = if_else(long_prob_matrix$Probability > 4.5, 'white', 'black'),) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_HomeC) +
  labs(title = paste("Match Final Score Probablity (1000 sims)"),
        subtitle = paste(Match_Fixture),
        x = paste0(Match_LFC, " Goals"), 
        y = paste0(Match_Oppo, " Goals"),
        caption = My_caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 16),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 14),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

MD_MC_Plot
```

``` {r Match probablity}
#|height: 50%
#result plot

# Calculate probabilities for different outcomes
Away_wins_prob <- (sum(prob_matrix[upper.tri(prob_matrix)])*100)
Home_wins_prob <- (sum(prob_matrix[lower.tri(prob_matrix)])*100)
tie_prob <- (sum(diag(prob_matrix))*100)

# Create a data frame for bar chart
outcome_prob <- data.frame(Outcome = c(Match_LFC, "Match Drawn", Match_Oppo),
                           Probability = c(Home_wins_prob, tie_prob, Away_wins_prob))

# Define custom colors
custom_colors <- c(Match_LFC = Color_LFC, "Match Drawn" = "gray", Match_Oppo = Color_Oppo)


# Create a bar chart
MD_MC_Result_Plot <- ggplot(outcome_prob) +
  geom_bar(aes(x = Outcome, y = Probability, fill = custom_colors), stat = "identity", colour = "black", width = 1)  +
  scale_fill_identity(name = "",
                      breaks = c(Color_LFC,"gray", Color_Oppo),
                      labels = c(Match_LFC, "Match Drawn", Match_Oppo),
                      guide = "legend") +
  geom_text(aes(x = Outcome, y = Probability, label = paste(Probability, " %")), vjust = -0.5,colour = "black") + 
#  scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors) +
  labs(title = "Probabilities of Match Outcome",
       subtitle = Match_Fixture,
       x = "", 
       y = "Probability %",
       caption = My_caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 16),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 14),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

MD_MC_Result_Plot
```


# Liverpool

## Row 1

```{r, echo=FALSE, results = "asis"}
LFCfiles <- list.files(path = "~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/UP Pod Prep 2324/Match day 21/viz pack/LFC",
                    pattern = "*.png",
                    full.names = TRUE) ## A cheeky one-liner
LFCfiles <- LFCfiles[order(file.info(LFCfiles)$mtime, decreasing = FALSE)]

for (file in LFCfiles) {
  cat("", "\n")
  cat("![](",file,")", "\n")
  cat("\n")
  caption <- paste0("**Caption:** ", tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file)), "\n")
  cat(caption)
  cat("", "\n")
  cat("\n")
  cat("\n")
}
```

# Opposition

### Row 1

```{r, echo=FALSE, results = "asis"}
LFCfiles <- list.files(path = "~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/UP Pod Prep 2324/Match day 21/viz pack/Oppo",
                    pattern = "*.png",
                    full.names = TRUE) ## A cheeky one-liner
LFCfiles <- LFCfiles[order(file.info(LFCfiles)$mtime, decreasing = FALSE)]

for (file in LFCfiles) {
  cat("", "\n")
  cat("![](",file,")", "\n")
  cat("\n")
  caption <- paste0("**Caption:** ", tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file)), "\n")
  cat(caption)
  cat("", "\n")
  cat("\n")
  cat("\n")
}
```

# Player Analysis

```{r}
#posession and goals by Player
MatchSummaryPLayerData <- plottingData %>%
  mutate(
    Out_of_play_time = round(Out_of_play_time / 60, 1),
    EventTime = round(EventTime / 60, 1),
    TeamEPV = as.numeric(ifelse(str_detect(`outcomeType/value`, "1"), paste0(EPVvalue), 0))) %>%
  group_by(teamId, playerId, role, player_image_url) %>%
  summarise_at(vars(Goals, TotalShots, 'OFT Shots' = OFShots, 'OT Shots' = OTShots, Out_Box_Shots, Touches, PK_Box_Touches, Attempted_Passes, Successful_Passes, TeamEPV, Key_Passes, Assists, Hockey_Assists, BCs, xG, xGOT, Aerial_total, Aerial_Won, Aerial_Lost, Ground_Duels_Total, Ground_Duels_Won, Ground_Duels_Lost), list(sum), na.rm = TRUE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(teamId) %>%
  mutate(
    Team_TotalTouches = sum(Touches),
    Team_TotalEPV = sum(TeamEPV),
    Team_TotalxG = sum(xG),
    Team_TotalPasses = sum(Attempted_Passes),
    Team_TotalDuels = sum(Ground_Duels_Total),
    Team_TotalAerials = sum(Aerial_total),
    Team_TotalShots = sum(TotalShots),
    Possession = round((Touches / Team_TotalTouches) * 100, 1),
    Pass_Success = round((Successful_Passes / Attempted_Passes) * 100, 1),
    Aerial_Success = round((Aerial_Won / Aerial_total) * 100, 1),
    Duel_Success = round((Ground_Duels_Won / Ground_Duels_Total) * 100, 1),
    On_Ball_Time = round(InPlayTime * (Possession / 100), 1),
    Team_EPV_P = round((TeamEPV / Team_TotalEPV) * 100, 1),
    Team_xG_P = round((xG / Team_TotalxG) * 100, 1),
    Team_Duels_P = round((Ground_Duels_Total / Team_TotalDuels) * 100, 1),
    Team_Aerial_P = round((Aerial_total / Team_TotalAerials) * 100, 1),
    Team_Passes_P = round((Attempted_Passes / Team_TotalPasses) * 100, 1),
    Team_Shots_P = round((TotalShots / Team_TotalShots) * 100, 1)
  ) %>%
  replace_na(list( Aerial_Success = 0)) %>%
  replace_na(list( Duel_Success = 0)) %>%
  ungroup()

MatchSummaryPLayerProfileData <- MatchSummaryPLayerData

#need to sort out posessions as adding the image mucks up the calculation, so might need to do left join with image later

MatchSummaryPLayerData <- MatchSummaryPLayerData %>%
  select(Team = teamId, role, Name = playerId, Player = player_image_url, '% of Team Possession' = Possession, `% of Team On Ball Time` = On_Ball_Time, Touches = Touches, 'Total Shots' = TotalShots, 'Out Box Shots' = Out_Box_Shots, BCs, Goals, xG, xGOT,  'Attempted Passes' = Attempted_Passes, 'Successful Passes' = Successful_Passes, 'Pass Success %' = Pass_Success, Assists, 'Key Passes' = Key_Passes, EPV = TeamEPV, '% of Team EPV' = Team_EPV_P, 'Aerials Total' = Aerial_total, 'Aerials Won' = Aerial_Won, 'Aerial Success %' = Aerial_Success, 'Duels Total' = Ground_Duels_Total, 'Duels Won' = Ground_Duels_Won, 'Duel Success' = Duel_Success)

#player summary tables
#data load check for data to be converted to number
MatchdayTableDefensive <- MD_defense
MatchdayTablePass <- MD_passing
MatchdayTablePosession <- MD_possession
MatchdayTableMisc <- MD_misc
MatchdayTableSummary <- MD_summary
MatchdayTableShots <- MD_shots
MatchdayTableLineups <- MD_lineups
MatchdayTableLogos <- MD_logos

#player URL FOTMob
MatchdayTableLogos <- MatchdayTableLogos %>%
  select("Mins" = stats_minutes_played, Player, role,
         PlayerURL = image_url) %>%
  mutate(Player = case_when(Player == "Konstantinos Tsimikas" ~ "Kostas Tsimikas",
                            Player == " Arthur" ~ "Arthur Melo", 
                            Player == " Fabinho" ~ "Fabinho",
                            Player == "Alisson Becker" ~ "Alisson",
                            Player == "Joel Matip" ~ "Joël Matip",
                            Player == "Joseph Gomez" ~ "Joe Gomez",
                            Player == "Ilkay Gündogan" ~ "İlkay Gündoğan",
                            Player == " Rodri" ~ "Rodri",
                            Player == "Darwin Nunez" ~ "Darwin Núñez",
                            Player == "Joao Félix" ~ "João Félix",
                            Player == "Mykhaylo Mudryk" ~ "Mykhailo Mudryk",
                            Player == "Mateo Kovacic" ~ "Mateo Kovačić",
                            Player == " Jorginho" ~ "Jorginho",
                            Player == "Martin Ødegaard" ~ "Martin Ødegaard",
                            Player == "Thiago Alcántara" ~ "Thiago Alcántara",
                            Player == " Gabriel" ~ "Gabriel Dos Santos",
                            Player == "Gabriel Martinelli" ~ "Martinelli",
                            Player == "Luis Diaz" ~ "Luis Díaz",
                            Player == " Rodrigo" ~ "Rodrigo",
                            Player == "Wilfried Gnonto" ~ "Degnand Gnonto",
                            Player == "Rasmus Kristensen" ~ "Rasmus Nissen",
                            Player == " Felipe" ~ "Felipe",
                            Player == " Danilo" ~ "Danilo",
                            Player == "Moussa Niakhaté" ~ "Moussa Niakhate",
                            Player == "Lukasz Fabianski" ~ "Łukasz Fabiański",
                            Player == "Vladimir Coufal" ~ "Vladimír Coufal",
                            Player == "Said Benrahma" ~ "Saïd Benrahma",
                            Player == "Tomas Soucek" ~ "Tomáš Souček",
                            Player == "Naif Aguerd" ~ "Nayef Aguerd",
                            Player == "Pierre-Emile Højbjerg" ~ "Pierre Højbjerg",
                            Player == "Ivan Perisic" ~ "Ivan Perišić",
                            Player == "Pape Sarr" ~ "Pape Matar Sarr",
                            Player == " Richarlison" ~ "Richarlison",
                            Player == "Heung-Min Son" ~ "Son Heung-min",
                            Player == "Sasa Lukic" ~ "Saša Lukić",
                            Player == "Joao Palhinha" ~ "João Palhinha", 
                            Player == " Willian" ~ "Willian",
                            Player == " Vinicius" ~ "Carlos Vinícius",
                            Player == "Joshua Dasilva" ~ "Josh Dasilva",
                            Player == "Emiliano Martinez" ~ "Emiliano Martínez",
                            Player == "Jhon Duran" ~ "Jhon Durán",
                            Player == "Emiliano Buendia" ~ "Emi Buendía",
                            Player == " Tete" ~ "Tetê",
                            Player == "Boubakary Soumaré" ~ "Boubakary Soumaré",
                            Player == "Romeo Lavia" ~ "Roméo Lavia",
                            Player == "Alex McCarthy" ~ "Alex McCarthy",
                            Player == "Caoimhin Kelleher" ~ "Caoimhín Kelleher",
                            Player == " Neto" ~ "Neto",
                            Player == "Hamed Traorè" ~ "Hamed Junior Traorè",
                            Player == " Joelinton" ~ "Joelinton",
                            Player == "Miguel Almiron" ~ "Miguel Almirón",
                            Player == "Daniel Burn" ~ "Dan Burn",
                            Player == "Bruno Guimaraes" ~ "Bruno Guimarães",
                            Player == "Ezri Konsa" ~ "Ezri Konsa",
                            Player == "Fabio Silva" ~ "Fábio Silva",
                            Player == "Hee-Chan Hwang" ~ "Hwang Hee-chan",
                            Player == "Thomas Doyle" ~ "Tommy Doyle",
                            Player == "Boubacar Traore" ~ "Boubacar Traoré",
                            Player == "Joao Gomes" ~ "João Gomes",
                            Player == "Rayan Ait Nouri" ~ "Rayan Aït Nouri",
                            Player == "Nicolo Zaniolo" ~ "Nicolò Zaniolo",
                            Player == "	Emerson" ~ "Emerson Palmieri",
                            Player == "Mohammed Kudus" ~ "Kudus Mohammed",
                            Player == "Iyenoma Udogie" ~ "Destiny Udogie",
                            Player == "Joao Pedro" ~  "João Pedro",
                            Player == " Igor" ~ "Igor",
                            Player == "Joel Veltman" ~ "Joël Veltman",
                            Player == "Pascal Gross" ~ "Pascal Groß",
                            Player == " Beto" ~ "Beto",
                            Player == "Vitalii Mykolenko" ~ "Vitaliy Mykolenko",
                            Player == "Nicolás Dominguez" ~ "Nicolás Domínguez",
                            Player == " Murillo" ~ "Murillo",
                            Player == "Alejo Veliz" ~ "Alejo Véliz",
                            Player == "Ruben Dias" ~ "Rúben Dias",
                            Player == "Ederson Moraes" ~ "Ederson",
                            Player == "Jérémy Doku" ~ "Jeremy Doku",
                            Player == "Yegor Yarmolyuk" ~ "Yehor Yarmoliuk",
                            Player == "Raul Jiménez" ~ "Raúl Jiménez",
                            Player == "Bénie Traoré" ~ "Bénie Adama Traore",
                            Player == "James McAtee" ~ "James Mcatee",
                            Player == "Vinicius de Souza Costa" ~ "Vinicius Souza",
                            Player == "Anel Ahmedhodzic" ~ "Anel Ahmedhodžić",
                            Player == "Wesley Foderingham" ~ "Wes Foderingham",
                            Player == "Odsonne Edouard" ~ "Odsonne Édouard",
                            Player == "Marc Guehi" ~ "Marc Guéhi",
                            Player == " Antony" ~ "Antony",
                            Player == "Andre Onana" ~ "André Onana",
                            Player == "Gabriel Martinelli" ~ "Gabriel Martinelli",
                            Player == "Gabriel" ~ "Gabriel Dos Santos",
                            Player == "Edward Nketiah" ~ "Eddie Nketiah",
                            Player == "Mike Tresor" ~ "Mike Trésor",
                            Player == "Martin Dubravka" ~ "Martin Dúbravka",
                            Player == "Johann Berg Gudmundsson" ~ "Jóhann Berg Guðmundsson",
  TRUE ~ as.character(Player))) %>%
  mutate(Player = case_when(Player == "Martinelli" ~ "Gabriel Martinelli", TRUE ~ as.character(Player))) %>%
  filter(!Mins == "NA") %>%
  select("Player", "PlayerURL", "Position" = role)

#MatchdayTableLogos <- Match_players %>%
#  select("Mins" = minutes_played, "Player" = playerId, role,
#         PlayerURL = player_image_url) %>%
#filter(!Mins == "NA") %>%
#  select("Player", "PlayerURL", "Position" = role)

#if there is an error in the table you can correct it here
#MatchdayTableLogos <- MatchdayTableLogos %>%
#mutate(Mins = as.numeric(ifelse(Player == "Yehor Yarmoliuk", 19, as.character(Mins))))

#Player xG PSxG (Fbref)
MatchdayTableShots <- MatchdayTableShots %>%
  select(Player, xG, PSxG) %>%
  mutate(xG = as.numeric(xG)) %>%
  mutate(PSxG = as.numeric(PSxG)) %>%
  mutate(PSxG = ifelse(is.na(PSxG), 0, PSxG)) %>%
  mutate(Player = sub(" \\(pen\\)", "", Player)) %>%
  group_by(Player) %>%
  summarize_all(sum, na.rm = TRUE)


#player Ariel duel data (FBREF)
#data wrangling
MatchdayTableMisc <- MatchdayTableMisc %>%
  select(Player,
         "Mins" = "Min",
         "Aerial Duel %" = 'Won_percent_Aerial_Duels',
         "Aerial Duel Wins" = 'Won_Aerial_Duels',
         "Aerial Duel Losses" = Lost_Aerial_Duels,
         "Shirt" = 'Player_Num') %>%
  filter(!Mins == "NA") %>%
  select(Player, `Aerial Duel Wins`, `Aerial Duel %`, `Aerial Duel Losses`)

#player SoT  data (FBREF)
#data wrangling
MatchdayTableSummary <- MatchdayTableSummary %>%
  mutate("Mins" = Min,
         "SOT" = SoT,
         "Total S" = Sh,
         "Shirt" = Player_Num,
         "Goals" = Gls) %>%
  filter(!Mins == "NA")

#Player Passing table for KPs and PP stats (FBREF)
#data wrangling
MatchdayTablePass <- MatchdayTablePass %>%
  mutate("Mins" = Min,
         "Successfull" = Cmp_percent_Total,
         "KPs" = KP,
         "PPs" = PrgP,
         "Position" = Pos,
         "xT" = xA,
         "Assists" = Ast,
         "xA" = xAG,
         "Final 3rd P" = Final_Third,
         "Shirt" = Player_Num) %>%
  filter(!Mins == "NA") %>%
  mutate('LongP' = Att_Long / Att_Total) %>%
  replace_na(list( Successfull = 0)) %>%
  replace_na(list( LongP = 0)) %>%
  select(Player, Successfull, KPs, PPs, xT, Assists, xA, `Final 3rd P`, LongP)
  

#Player Possession table for receiving stats (Fbref)
#data wrangling
MatchdayTablePosession <- MatchdayTablePosession %>%
  mutate("Mins" = Min,
         "Def 3rd Touches" = `Def 3rd_Touches`,
         "Mid 3rd Touches" = `Mid 3rd_Touches`,
         "Final 3rd Touches" = `Att 3rd_Touches`,
         "PK Box Touches" = `Att Pen_Touches`,
         "Passes Received" = Rec_Receiving,
         "PP Recieved" = PrgR_Receiving,
         "Total T" = Touches_Touches,
         "Shirt" = Player_Num,
         "Carries" = Carries_Carries,
         "P Carries" = PrgC_Carries,
         "F 3rd Carries" = Final_Third_Carries,
         "Carries Distance" = TotDist_Carries,
         "P Carrie Distance" = PrgDist_Carries) %>%
  filter(!Mins == "NA") %>%
  mutate(Carries = as.numeric(Carries)) %>%
  mutate(`% F 3rd Carries` = `F 3rd Carries` / Carries) %>%
  mutate(`% P Carries` = `P Carries` / Carries) %>%
  mutate(`% Carries D Prog` = `P Carrie Distance` / `Carries Distance`) %>%
  mutate(`D 3rd Touches / Min` = `Def 3rd Touches` / Mins) %>%
  mutate(`M 3rd Touches / Min` = `Mid 3rd Touches` / Mins) %>%
  mutate(`PK Box Touches / Min` = `PK Box Touches` / Mins) %>%
  mutate(`F 3rd Touches / Min` = `Final 3rd Touches` / Mins) %>%
  mutate(`% T D 3rd` = `Def 3rd Touches` / `Total T`) %>%
  mutate(`% T M 3rd` = `Mid 3rd Touches` / `Total T`) %>%
  mutate(`% T F 3rd` = `Final 3rd Touches` / `Total T`) %>%
  mutate(`% T PK Box` = `PK Box Touches` / `Total T`) %>%
  mutate(`T / Min` = `Total T` / Mins) %>%
  replace_na(list( `% T D 3rd` = 0)) %>%
  replace_na(list( `% T M 3rd` = 0)) %>%
  replace_na(list( `% T F 3rd` = 0)) %>%
  replace_na(list( `% T PK Box` = 0)) %>%
  replace_na(list( `% Carries D Prog` = 0)) %>%
  replace_na(list( `% F 3rd Carries` = 0)) %>%
  replace_na(list( `% P Carries` = 0))
  


#Player Attacking table
#data wrangling
MatchdayTableAtt <- MatchdayTableSummary %>%
  left_join(MatchdayTableLogos, by = c("Player" = "Player"), copy = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(`Total S` = ifelse(is.na(`Total S`), 0, `Total S`)) %>%
  left_join(MatchdayTableShots, by = c("Player" = "Player"), copy = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(PSxG = ifelse(is.na(PSxG), 0, PSxG),
         xG = ifelse(is.na(xG),0,xG)) %>%
  left_join(MatchdayTablePass, by = c("Player" = "Player"), copy = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(`Final 3rd P` = ifelse(is.na(`Final 3rd P`), 0, `Final 3rd P`),
         xT = ifelse(is.na(xT), 0, xT),
         xA = ifelse(is.na(xA), 0, xA)) %>%
  mutate(full_name = Player,
         Player = PlayerURL)

#remove duplicate row
MatchdayTableAtt <- MatchdayTableAtt %>%
  distinct(full_name, .keep_all = TRUE)

MatchdayTableAtt <- MatchdayTableAtt %>%
  mutate(`P Received` = MatchdayTablePosession$`Passes Received`,
         `PPs Received` = MatchdayTablePosession$`PP Recieved`,
         `S / Min` = (`Total S` / Mins),
         `Final 3rd P / Min` = `Final 3rd P` / Mins) %>%
  mutate(`Prog Ps` = PPs,
         `Long P %` = LongP,
         `Success %` = (Successfull/100))

#Player defensive table (FBREF)
#data wrangling
MatchdayTableDef <- MatchdayTablePosession %>%
  left_join(MatchdayTableLogos, by = c("Player" = "Player"), copy = TRUE) %>%
  left_join(MatchdayTableMisc, by = c("Player" = "Player"), copy = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(`Aerial Duel %` = ifelse(is.na(`Aerial Duel %`), 0, `Aerial Duel %`)) %>%
  mutate(full_name = Player,
         Player = PlayerURL,
         Total = `Total T`)
  
MatchdayTableDef <- MatchdayTableDef %>%
  mutate(`Total / Min` = `T / Min`,
         `Def 3rd` = `Def 3rd Touches`,
         `Def 3rd / Min` = `D 3rd Touches / Min`,
         `Def 3rd % TT` = `% T D 3rd`,
         `Mid 3rd` = `Mid 3rd Touches`,
         `Mid 3rd / Min` = `M 3rd Touches / Min`,
         `Mid 3rd % TT` = `% T M 3rd`,
         `Final 3rd` = `Final 3rd Touches`,
         `Final 3rd / Min` = `F 3rd Touches / Min`,
         `Final 3rd % TT` = `% T F 3rd`,
         `PK Box` = `PK Box Touches`,
         `PK Box / Min` = `PK Box Touches / Min`,
         `PK Box % TT` = `% T PK Box`,
         `Carries Distance (D)` = `Carries Distance`,
         `% Carries F 3rd` = `% F 3rd Carries`,
         `% Carries Prog` = `% P Carries`,
         `% Carries D Prog` = `% Carries D Prog`)

#remove duplicate row
MatchdayTableDef <- MatchdayTableDef %>%
  distinct(full_name, .keep_all = TRUE)


```

## Row 1 {height = "80%"}

``` {r home PLayer analysis}
#|height: 80%
MatchSummaryPlayerTableHome <- MatchSummaryPLayerData %>%
  filter(Team == Match_LFC) %>%
  gt(groupname_col = "role", rowname_col = "Name") %>%
  row_group_order(groups = c("Keeper","Defender","Midfielder", "Attacker")) %>%
  cols_align(align = "right", columns = everything()) %>%
  tab_header(
    title = paste0(Match_LFC, " Player Match Summary"),
    subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture)) %>%
  tab_source_note(md(caption)) %>%
  cols_hide(Team) %>%
  gt_img_rows(columns = Player, height = 25) %>%
#  gt_img_circle(column = 'Player', height = 40, border_color = "black", border_weight = 1.5) %>%
#  cols_width(Player ~ px(45)) %>% # 110 = 100 (height) + 10 (padding around imgs)
  summary_rows(columns = c(5:26), fns = list(Average = ~ mean (., na.rm=TRUE)), fmt = list(~fmt_number(., decimals = 1))) %>%
  summary_rows(columns = c(5:26), fns = list(Total = ~ sum (., na.rm=TRUE)), fmt = list(~fmt_number(., decimals = 0))) %>%
  fmt_percent(
    columns = c(4:5, 6, 16, 20, 23, 26),
    scale_values = FALSE,
    decimals = 1
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(19),
    decimals = 2) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Shots", columns = c(8:13)) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Passes", columns = c(14:20)) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Duels", columns = c(21:26)) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(color = "#E5E5E5"),
    locations = cells_column_labels('Player')) %>%
  tab_style(
    locations = cells_column_spanners('Shots'),
    style = list(cell_text(weight = "bold", size = 16))) %>%
  tab_style(
    locations = cells_column_spanners('Passes'),
    style = list(cell_text(weight = "bold", size = 16))) %>%
  tab_style(
    locations = cells_column_spanners('Duels'),
    style = list(cell_text(weight = "bold", size = 16))) %>%
  tab_style(
    locations = cells_title(groups = "title"),
    style = list(cell_text(weight = "bold", size = 16))) %>%
  tab_options(
    heading.padding = px(1),
    heading.align = "left",
    column_labels.background.color = "#E5E5E5",
    row_group.background.color = Color_LFC,
    stub.background.color = "#E5E5E5",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "black",
    summary_row.background.color = "#E5E5E5",
    table.font.size = 14,
    heading.title.font.size = 16,
    heading.subtitle.font.size = 14,
    source_notes.font.size = 8,
    table.width = "100%") %>%
  gt_color_rows(columns = c(5), palette = ColorScale_Home, domain = c(0,15)) %>%
  gt_color_rows(columns = c(6, 7, 14, 15, 16, 20, 23, 26), palette = ColorScale_Home, domain = c(0,100)) %>%
  gt_color_rows(columns = c(8, 21, 25), palette = ColorScale_Home, domain = c(0,10)) %>%
  gt_color_rows(columns = c(9:11, 17:18), palette = ColorScale_Home, domain = c(0,5)) %>%
  gt_color_rows(columns = c(22, 24), palette = ColorScale_Home, domain = c(0,20)) %>%
  gt_color_rows(columns = c(19), palette = ColorScale_Home, domain = c(0,1)) %>%
  gt_color_rows(columns = c(12:13), palette = ColorScale_Home, domain = c(0,3))


MatchSummaryPlayerTableHome
```

``` {r away player analysis}
#|height: 80%
MatchSummaryPlayerTableAway <- MatchSummaryPLayerData %>%
  filter(Team == Match_Oppo) %>%
  gt(groupname_col = "role", rowname_col = "Name") %>%
  row_group_order(groups = c("Keeper","Defender","Midfielder", "Attacker")) %>%
  cols_align(align = "right", columns = everything()) %>%
  tab_header(
    title = paste0(Match_Oppo, " Player Match Summary"),
    subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture)) %>%
  tab_source_note(md(caption)) %>%
  cols_hide(Team) %>%
    gt_img_rows(columns = Player, height = 25) %>%
#  gt_img_circle(column = 'Player', height = 40, border_color = "black", border_weight = 1.5) %>%
#  cols_width(Player ~ px(45)) %>% # 110 = 100 (height) + 10 (padding around imgs)
  summary_rows(columns = c(5:26), fns = list(Average = ~ mean (., na.rm=TRUE)), fmt = list(~fmt_number(., decimals = 1))) %>%
  summary_rows(columns = c(5:26), fns = list(Total = ~ sum (., na.rm=TRUE)), fmt = list(~fmt_number(., decimals = 0))) %>%
  fmt_percent(
    columns = c(4:5, 6, 16, 20, 23, 26),
    scale_values = FALSE,
    decimals = 1
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(19),
    decimals = 2) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Shots", columns = c(8:13)) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Passes", columns = c(14:20)) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Duels", columns = c(21:26)) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(color = "#E5E5E5"),
    locations = cells_column_labels('Player')) %>%
  tab_style(
    locations = cells_column_spanners('Shots'),
    style = list(cell_text(weight = "bold", size = 16))) %>%
  tab_style(
    locations = cells_column_spanners('Passes'),
    style = list(cell_text(weight = "bold", size = 16))) %>%
  tab_style(
    locations = cells_column_spanners('Duels'),
    style = list(cell_text(weight = "bold", size = 16))) %>%
  tab_style(
    locations = cells_title(groups = "title"),
    style = list(cell_text(weight = "bold", size = 16))) %>%
  tab_options(
    heading.padding = px(1),
    heading.align = "left",
    column_labels.background.color = "#E5E5E5",
    row_group.background.color = Color_Oppo,
    stub.background.color = "#E5E5E5",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "black",
    summary_row.background.color = "#E5E5E5",
    table.font.size = 14,
    heading.title.font.size = 16,
    heading.subtitle.font.size = 14,
    source_notes.font.size = 8,
    table.width = "100%") %>%
  gt_color_rows(columns = c(5), palette = ColorScale_Away, domain = c(0,15)) %>%
  gt_color_rows(columns = c(6, 7, 14, 15, 16, 20, 23, 26), palette = ColorScale_Away, domain = c(0,100)) %>%
  gt_color_rows(columns = c(8, 21, 25), palette = ColorScale_Away, domain = c(0,10)) %>%
  gt_color_rows(columns = c(9:11, 17:18), palette = ColorScale_Away, domain = c(0,5)) %>%
  gt_color_rows(columns = c(22, 24), palette = ColorScale_Away, domain = c(0,20)) %>%
  gt_color_rows(columns = c(19), palette = ColorScale_Away, domain = c(0,1)) %>%
  gt_color_rows(columns = c(12:13), palette = ColorScale_Away, domain = c(0,3))

MatchSummaryPlayerTableAway
```

## Row 2

```{r}
Player_Summary_plot_data <- MatchSummaryPLayerProfileData %>%
  select(Team = teamId, Name = playerId, role, '% Team Possession' = Possession, `% Team On Ball Time` = On_Ball_Time, Touches = Touches, 'Total Shots' = TotalShots, 'OFT Shots', 'OT Shots', 'Out Box Shots' = Out_Box_Shots, BCs, Goals, xG, xGOT, '% Team xG' = Team_xG_P, Touches, PK_Box_Touches, 'Attempted Passes' = Attempted_Passes, 'Successful Passes' = Successful_Passes, 'Pass Success %' = Pass_Success, Assists, 'Key Passes' = Key_Passes, EPV = TeamEPV, '% Team EPV' = Team_EPV_P, 'Aerials Total' = Aerial_total, 'Aerials Won' = Aerial_Won, 'Aerial Success %' = Aerial_Success, 'Duels Total' = Ground_Duels_Total, 'Duels Won' = Ground_Duels_Won, 'Duel Success %' = Duel_Success, '% Team Duels' = Team_Duels_P, '% Team Passes' = Team_Passes_P, '% Team Shots' = Team_Shots_P, '% Team Aerials' = Team_Aerial_P)


Player_Summary_data <- Player_Summary_plot_data %>%
  select(Team, Name, role, '% Team Possession', '% Team On Ball Time', '% Team EPV', '% Team Passes', '% Team Shots', '% Team Duels', '% Team Aerials') %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c('% Team Possession', '% Team On Ball Time', '% Team EPV','% Team Passes', '% Team Shots', '% Team Duels', '% Team Aerials'), names_to = "Metric", values_to = "Value")

#  select(Team, Name, role, '% of Team Possession', '% of Team On Ball Time', '% Team EPV', '% Team xG', 'Pass Success %', 'Aerial Success %', 'Duel Success %') %>%
#  pivot_longer(cols = c('% of Team Possession', '% of Team On Ball Time', '% Team EPV', '% Team xG',  'Pass Success %', 'Aerial Success %', 'Duel Success %'), names_to = "Metric", values_to = "Value")



#select(Team, Name, role, '% of Team Possession', '% of Team On Ball Time', Touches, 'Total Shots', 'Attempted Passes', 'Successful Passes', 'Pass Success %', EPV, 'Aerials Total', 'Aerials Won', 'Aerial Success %', 'Duels Total', 'Duels Won', 'Duel Success') %>%
#  pivot_longer(cols = c('% of Team Possession', '% of Team On Ball Time', Touches, 'Total Shots', 'Attempted Passes', 'Successful Passes', 'Pass Success %', EPV, 'Aerials Total', 'Aerials Won', 'Aerial Success %', 'Duels Total', 'Duels Won', 'Duel Success'), names_to = "Metric", values_to = "Value")

Player_Goal_data <- Player_Summary_plot_data %>%
  select(Team, Name, role, 'OFT Shots', 'OT Shots', 'Out Box Shots', BCs, Goals, Assists, 'Key Passes') %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(`OFT Shots`, 'OT Shots', `Out Box Shots`, BCs, Goals, Assists, `Key Passes`), names_to = "Metric", values_to = "Value") 

#filter data by team
Player_Summary_plot_data_Home <- Player_Summary_data %>%
  filter(Team == Match_LFC)

Player_Summary_plot_data_Away <- Player_Summary_data %>%
  filter(Team == Match_Oppo) 

Player_Goal_plot_data_Home <- Player_Goal_data %>%
  filter(Team == Match_LFC)

Player_Goal_plot_data_Away <- Player_Goal_data %>%
  filter(Team == Match_Oppo) 


#work out team and unit averages
#general metrics
Player_Summary_data_Home  <- Player_Summary_plot_data_Home  %>%
group_by(Metric) %>%
  mutate(TeamAverage = round(mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE),2)) %>%
  ungroup()

Player_Summary_data_Home  <- Player_Summary_plot_data_Home  %>%
  group_by(role, Metric) %>%
  mutate(UnitAverage = round(mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE),2)) %>%
  ungroup()

Player_Summary_data_Away  <- Player_Summary_plot_data_Away  %>%
  group_by(Metric) %>%
  mutate(TeamAverage = round(mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE),2)) %>%
  ungroup()

Player_Summary_data_Away  <- Player_Summary_plot_data_Away  %>%
  group_by(role, Metric) %>%
  mutate(UnitAverage = round(mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE),2)) %>%
  ungroup()

#goal metrics
Player_Goal_data_Home  <- Player_Goal_plot_data_Home  %>%
  group_by(Metric) %>%
  mutate(TeamAverage = round(mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE),2)) %>%
  ungroup()

Player_Goal_data_Home  <- Player_Goal_plot_data_Home  %>%
  group_by(role, Metric) %>%
  mutate(UnitAverage = round(mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE),2)) %>%
  ungroup()

Player_Goal_data_Away  <- Player_Goal_plot_data_Away  %>%
  group_by(Metric) %>%
  mutate(TeamAverage = round(mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE),2)) %>%
  ungroup()

Player_Goal_data_Away  <- Player_Goal_plot_data_Away  %>%
  group_by(role, Metric) %>%
  mutate(UnitAverage = round(mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE),2)) %>%
  ungroup()



#wrap the tiles for the general plot
Player_Summary_data_Home$Metric  <- str_wrap(Player_Summary_data_Home$Metric, width = 5)  

Player_Summary_data_Away$Metric  <- str_wrap(Player_Summary_data_Away$Metric, width = 5)  


#wrap the tiles for the goal plot
Player_Goal_data_Home$Metric  <- str_wrap(Player_Goal_data_Home$Metric, width = 5)  

Player_Goal_data_Away$Metric  <- str_wrap(Player_Goal_data_Away$Metric, width = 5)  


#reorder data
facet_order <- c("Keeper", "Defender", "Midfielder", "Attacker")

#general plot
Player_Summary_data_Home  <- Player_Summary_data_Home  %>%
arrange(factor(role, levels = facet_order))

Player_Summary_data_Away  <- Player_Summary_data_Away  %>%
  arrange(factor(role, levels = facet_order))

#goal plot
Player_Goal_data_Home <- Player_Goal_data_Home %>%
  arrange(factor(role, levels = facet_order))

Player_Goal_data_Away <- Player_Goal_data_Away %>%
  arrange(factor(role, levels = facet_order))


```

``` {r}
#| width: 90%
# this copies the player name columna into a new column and shifts it up one to then be the reciever 
shift_column <- function(data, columns, new_names = sprintf("%s.Shifted", columns), len = 1L, up = TRUE) {
  if (length(columns) != length(new_names)) {
    stop("columns and new_names must be the same length")
  }
  
  # get the rows to keep based on how much to shift it by and weather to shift up or down
  rowsToKeep <- seq(from = 1 + len * up, length.out = NROW(data) - len)
  
  # for the original data -- it needs to be shifted the other way
  dataRowsToKeep <- seq(from = 1 + len * !up, length.out = NROW(data) - len)
  
  #create a df of the shifted rows
  shiftedDF <- data[rowsToKeep, columns]
  
  # give the right names to these new columns
  names(shiftedDF) <- new_names
  
  # data names
  dataNames <- names(data)
  
  # get rid of excess rows in data
  data <- data[dataRowsToKeep, ]
  
  # tack shifted data onto the end of the original (and cutoff) data
  data <- cbind(data, shiftedDF)
  names(data) <- c(dataNames, new_names)
  
  return(data)
  } 

PassConnections <- plottingData 
PassConnections <- PassConnections[complete.cases(PassConnections[, "playerId"]), ]
PassConnections <- PassConnections[complete.cases(PassConnections[, "teamId"]), ]
PassConnections <- shift_column(data = PassConnections, columns = "playerId", new_names = "receiver", len = 1, up = TRUE)
PassConnections <- shift_column(data = PassConnections, columns = "teamId", new_names = "receiver_team", len = 1, up = TRUE)
PassConnections <- shift_column(data = PassConnections, columns = "player_image_url", new_names = "receiver_URL", len = 1, up = TRUE)


# number of passess between players - add in bc and kps
PassConnections <- PassConnections %>%
  filter(type == "Pass") %>% 
  select(Passer = playerId, Receiver = receiver, Passer_Team = teamId, Passer_URL = player_image_url, Receiver_Team = receiver_team, Receiver_URL = receiver_URL, Successful_Passes, BCs, Key_Passes) 

#calculate pass success
PassConnections <- PassConnections %>%
  group_by(Passer, Receiver, Passer_Team, Receiver_Team, Passer_URL, Receiver_URL) %>% 
  summarise(Passes = n(), Successful_Passes = sum(Successful_Passes), Key_Passes = sum(Key_Passes), BCs = sum(BCs)) %>% 
  na.omit() %>%
  mutate(Pass_Suc = (round(Successful_Passes / Passes,2)*100)) %>%
  replace_na(list(Pass_Suc = 0))

#filter by over 5 connections
PassConnections <- PassConnections %>%
  group_by(Passer = pmin(Passer, Passer), Receiver = pmax(Receiver, Receiver), Passer_Team, Receiver_Team, Passer_URL, Receiver_URL) %>%
  filter(Passes >= 5) %>%
  summarise(Passes = sum(Passes), Successful_Passes = sum(Successful_Passes), Pass_Success = mean(Pass_Suc), Key_Passes = sum(Key_Passes), BCs = sum(BCs))

#prep for main tables
PassConnectiondata <- PassConnections %>%
  select(Passer_Team, Passer, Passer_URL, Receiver, Receiver_Team, Receiver_URL, 'Attempted Passes' = Passes, 'Successful Passes' = Successful_Passes, 'Pass Success %' = Pass_Success, 'Key Passes' = Key_Passes)

#Home pass connextions tables
PassConnectionTableHome <- PassConnectiondata %>%
  filter(Receiver_Team == Match_LFC, 
         Passer_Team == Match_LFC) %>%
  gt(rowname_col = "Receiver", groupname_col = "Passer") %>%
  cols_align(align = "right", columns = everything()) %>%
  gt_img_rows(columns = Passer_URL, height = 25) %>%
  gt_img_rows(columns = Receiver_URL, height = 25) %>%
#  gt_img_circle(column = 'Passer_URL', height = 40, border_color = "black", border_weight = 1.5) %>%
#  cols_width(Passer_URL ~ px(30)) %>% # 110 = 100 (height) + 10 (padding around imgs)
#  gt_img_circle(column = 'Receiver_URL', height = 40, border_color = "black", border_weight = 1.5) %>%
#  cols_width(Receiver_URL ~ px(30)) %>% # 110 = 100 (height) + 10 (padding around imgs)
  fmt_percent(
    columns = c(5),
    scale_values = FALSE,
    decimals = 1
   ) %>%
  cols_hide(columns = c(Passer_Team, Receiver_Team)) %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md(paste0(Match_LFC, " Open Play Passing connections")),
    subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture, " Min 5 passes")) %>%
  tab_source_note(md(caption)) %>%
  tab_options(
    heading.padding = px(1),
    heading.align = "left",
    column_labels.background.color = "#E5E5E5",
    row_group.background.color = Color_LFC,
    stub.background.color = "#E5E5E5",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "black",
    summary_row.background.color = "#E5E5E5",
    table.font.size = 14,
    heading.title.font.size = 16,
    heading.subtitle.font.size = 14,
    source_notes.font.size = 8,
    table.width = "100%") %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(color = "#E5E5E5"),
    locations = cells_column_labels('Receiver_URL')) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(color = "#E5E5E5"),
    locations = cells_column_labels('Passer_URL')) %>%
  tab_style(locations = cells_title(groups = "title"),style = list(cell_text(weight = "bold", size = 16))) 

PassConnectionTableHome
```

```{r}
#| width: 90%
#away Pass connections table
PassConnectionTableAway <- PassConnectiondata %>%
  filter(Receiver_Team == Match_Oppo,
         Passer_Team == Match_Oppo) %>%
  gt(rowname_col = "Receiver", groupname_col = "Passer") %>%
  cols_align(align = "right", columns = everything()) %>%
  gt_img_rows(columns = Passer_URL, height = 25) %>%
  gt_img_rows(columns = Receiver_URL, height = 25) %>%
#  gt_img_circle(column = 'Passer_URL', height = 40, border_color = "black", border_weight = 1.5) %>%
#  cols_width(Passer_URL ~ px(30)) %>% # 110 = 100 (height) + 10 (padding around imgs)
#  gt_img_circle(column = 'Receiver_URL', height = 40, border_color = "black", border_weight = 1.5) %>%
#  cols_width(Receiver_URL ~ px(30)) %>% # 110 = 100 (height) + 10 (padding around imgs)
  fmt_percent(
    columns = c(5),
    scale_values = FALSE,
    decimals = 1
  ) %>%
  cols_hide(columns = c(Passer_Team, Receiver_Team)) %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md(paste0(Match_Oppo, " Open Play Passing connections")),
    subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture, " Min 5 passes")) %>%
  tab_source_note(md(caption)) %>%
  tab_options(
    heading.padding = px(1),
    heading.align = "left",
    column_labels.background.color = "#E5E5E5",
    row_group.background.color = Color_Oppo,
    stub.background.color = "#E5E5E5",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "black",
    summary_row.background.color = "#E5E5E5",
    table.font.size = 14,
    heading.title.font.size = 16,
    heading.subtitle.font.size = 14,
    source_notes.font.size = 8,
    table.width = "100%") %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(color = "#E5E5E5"),
    locations = cells_column_labels('Receiver_URL')) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(color = "#E5E5E5"),
    locations = cells_column_labels('Passer_URL')) %>%
  tab_style(locations = cells_title(groups = "title"),style = list(cell_text(weight = "bold", size = 16)))

PassConnectionTableAway
```

# EPV Analysis

## Row 1

``` {r}  

EPVHeatMapData <- plottingData %>%
  filter(teamId == Match_LFC) %>%
  filter(!`qualifiers/0/type/value` == 2, 
         !`qualifiers/0/type/value` == 6, #corner
         !`qualifiers/0/type/value` == 5, #free kick
         !`qualifiers/0/type/value` == 107, #throw in
         !`qualifiers/1/type/value` == 2, 
         !`qualifiers/1/type/value` == 6,
         !`qualifiers/1/type/value` == 5,
         !`qualifiers/1/type/value` == 107,
         !`qualifiers/2/type/value` == 2, 
         !`qualifiers/2/type/value` == 6,
         !`qualifiers/2/type/value` == 5,
         !`qualifiers/2/type/value` == 107,
         !`qualifiers/3/type/value` == 2, 
         !`qualifiers/3/type/value` == 6,
         !`qualifiers/3/type/value` == 5,
         !`qualifiers/3/type/value` == 107,
         `type/value` == 1 & `outcomeType/value` == 1 |
           `type/value` == 2 & `outcomeType/value` == 1 | 
           `type/value` == 3 & `outcomeType/value` == 1 |
           `type/value` == 4 & `outcomeType/value` == 1 |
           `type/value` == 9 |
           `type/value` == 7 |
           `type/value` == 8 |
           `type/value` == 10 |
           `type/value` == 11 |
           `type/value` == 12 |
           `type/value` == 13 |
           `type/value` == 14 |
           `type/value` == 15 |
           `type/value` == 16 |
           `type/value` == 41 |
           `type/value` == 44 |
           `type/value` == 42 |
           `type/value` == 45 |
           `type/value` == 50 |
           `type/value` == 52 |
           `type/value` == 54 |
           `type/value` == 61 |
           `type/value` == 73 |
           `type/value` == 74)

#set time period
EPVHeatMapDataFT <- EPVHeatMapData

#set EPV total for time period
HomeEPVFT <- sum(EPVHeatMapDataFT$EPVvalue)

# Create a new variable to represent the zone for each observation
EPVHeatMapDataFT$zone_x <- cut(EPVHeatMapDataFT$x, breaks = c(0, 17, 33.2, 50, 66.4, 83, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)
EPVHeatMapDataFT$zone_y <- cut(EPVHeatMapDataFT$y, breaks = c(0, 21.1, 36.8, 63.2, 78.9, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)

# Calculate average EPV for each zone
average_epvFT <- EPVHeatMapDataFT %>%
  group_by(zone_x, zone_y) %>%
  summarize(avg_epv = sum(EPVvalue, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(avg_epv = round(ifelse(avg_epv < 0, abs(avg_epv), avg_epv), 3),
         PEPV = round(avg_epv/HomeEPVFT,3)) 

# Plot the tile plot
EPVMapplotFT <- ggplot(average_epvFT, aes(x = zone_x, y = zone_y, fill = avg_epv)) +
  theme_pitch() +
  
  #geometrics
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = PEPV, size = 3)) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_HomeC) +

  #formatting
  labs(title = "LFC Open Play EPV Heat Map - Full Game", 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher EPV, \nBox figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

#calculate for combined tile and heat map
average_epvNZFT <- average_epvFT %>%
  mutate(x = ifelse(zone_x == "[0,17]", 8.5,
                    ifelse(zone_x == "(17,33.2]", 25.1,
                           ifelse(zone_x == "(33.2,50]", 41.6,
                                  ifelse(zone_x == "(50,66.4]", 58.2,
                                         ifelse(zone_x == "(66.4,83]", 74.7,
                                                ifelse(zone_x == "(83,100]", 91.5, NA))))))) %>%
  mutate(y = ifelse(zone_y == "[0,21.1]", 10,
                    ifelse(zone_y == "(21.1,36.8]", 30,
                           ifelse(zone_y == "(36.8,63.2]", 50,
                                  ifelse(zone_y == "(63.2,78.9]", 70,
                                         ifelse(zone_y == "(78.9,100]", 90, NA))))))

average_epvNZFT <- average_epvNZFT %>%
  group_by(x, y) %>%
  summarise(avg_epv = sum(avg_epv, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(PEPV = 100*(round(avg_epv/HomeEPVFT,2)))  


EPVHeatMapplotFT <- EPVHeatMapDataFT %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_opta, fill = "#E5E5E5", colour = "#454545") +
  theme_pitch() +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 21.1, yend = 21.1, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 36.8, yend = 36.8, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 63.2, yend = 63.2, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 78.9, yend = 78.9, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 17, xend = 17), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 33.2, xend = 33.2), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 50, xend = 50), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 66.4, xend = 66.4), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 83, xend = 83), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  
  # add zone percentage numbers
  geom_text(data = average_epvNZFT, aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste(PEPV, "%")), size = 4) +
  
  #geometrics
  stat_density_2d_filled(aes(level = EPV, fill = after_stat(level)), alpha = 0.8, adjust = 0.1, linewidth = 2) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Home) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = "LFC Open Play EPV Heat Map - Full Game", 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher \nEPV, Box figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  My_caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

EPVHeatMapplotFT

#EPVHeatMapplotFT_I <- ggplotly(EPVHeatMapplotFT)
#EPVHeatMapplotFT_I
################################################################
```

``` {r}
#Oppo EPV heat plots

OppoEPVHeatMapData <- plottingData %>%
  filter(teamId == Match_Oppo) %>%
  filter(!`qualifiers/0/type/value` == 2, 
         !`qualifiers/0/type/value` == 6, #corner
         !`qualifiers/0/type/value` == 5, #free kick
         !`qualifiers/0/type/value` == 107, #throw in
         !`qualifiers/1/type/value` == 2, 
         !`qualifiers/1/type/value` == 6,
         !`qualifiers/1/type/value` == 5,
         !`qualifiers/1/type/value` == 107,
         !`qualifiers/2/type/value` == 2, 
         !`qualifiers/2/type/value` == 6,
         !`qualifiers/2/type/value` == 5,
         !`qualifiers/2/type/value` == 107,
         !`qualifiers/3/type/value` == 2, 
         !`qualifiers/3/type/value` == 6,
         !`qualifiers/3/type/value` == 5,
         !`qualifiers/3/type/value` == 107,
         `type/value` == 1 & `outcomeType/value` == 1 |
           `type/value` == 2 & `outcomeType/value` == 1 | 
           `type/value` == 3 & `outcomeType/value` == 1 |
           `type/value` == 4 & `outcomeType/value` == 1 |
           `type/value` == 9 |
           `type/value` == 7 |
           `type/value` == 8 |
           `type/value` == 10 |
           `type/value` == 11 |
           `type/value` == 12 |
           `type/value` == 13 |
           `type/value` == 14 |
           `type/value` == 15 |
           `type/value` == 16 |
           `type/value` == 41 |
           `type/value` == 44 |
           `type/value` == 42 |
           `type/value` == 45 |
           `type/value` == 50 |
           `type/value` == 52 |
           `type/value` == 54 |
           `type/value` == 61 |
           `type/value` == 73 |
           `type/value` == 74)

#set for time period
OppoEPVHeatMapDataFT <- OppoEPVHeatMapData

#set EPV total for time period
OppoEPVFT <- sum(OppoEPVHeatMapDataFT$EPVvalue)


# Create a new variable to represent the zone for each observation
OppoEPVHeatMapDataFT$zone_x <- cut(OppoEPVHeatMapDataFT$x, breaks = c(0, 17, 33.2, 50, 66.4, 83, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)
OppoEPVHeatMapDataFT$zone_y <- cut(OppoEPVHeatMapDataFT$y, breaks = c(0, 21.1, 36.8, 63.2, 78.9, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)

# Calculate average EPV for each zone
Oppoaverage_epvFT <- OppoEPVHeatMapDataFT %>%
  group_by(zone_x, zone_y) %>%
  summarize(avg_epv = sum(EPVvalue, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(avg_epv = round(ifelse(avg_epv < 0, abs(avg_epv), avg_epv), 3),
         PEPV = round(avg_epv/OppoEPVFT,3)) 

# Plot the tile plot
OppoEPVMapplotFT <- ggplot(Oppoaverage_epvFT, aes(x = zone_x, y = zone_y, fill = avg_epv)) +
  theme_pitch() +
  
  #geometrics
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = PEPV, size = 3)) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_AwayC) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = paste(Match_Oppo," Open Play EPV Heat Map - Full Game"), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher EPV, \nBox figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

#OppoEPVMapplotFT

#save tile Map plot
#ggsave("Oppo Open Play EPV Tile Map FT.png", width = 2500, height = 2150, units = "px", dpi = 400)


#calculate for combined tile and heat map
Oppoaverage_epvNZFT <- Oppoaverage_epvFT %>%
  mutate(x = ifelse(zone_x == "[0,17]", 8.5,
                    ifelse(zone_x == "(17,33.2]", 25.1,
                           ifelse(zone_x == "(33.2,50]", 41.6,
                                  ifelse(zone_x == "(50,66.4]", 58.2,
                                         ifelse(zone_x == "(66.4,83]", 74.7,
                                                ifelse(zone_x == "(83,100]", 91.5, NA))))))) %>%
  mutate(y = ifelse(zone_y == "[0,21.1]", 10,
                    ifelse(zone_y == "(21.1,36.8]", 30,
                           ifelse(zone_y == "(36.8,63.2]", 50,
                                  ifelse(zone_y == "(63.2,78.9]", 70,
                                         ifelse(zone_y == "(78.9,100]", 90, NA))))))

Oppoaverage_epvNZFT <- Oppoaverage_epvNZFT %>%
  group_by(x, y) %>%
  summarise(avg_epv = sum(avg_epv, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(PEPV = 100*(round(avg_epv/OppoEPVFT,2)))  


OppoEPVHeatMapplotFT <- OppoEPVHeatMapDataFT %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_opta, fill = "#E5E5E5", colour = "#454545") +
  theme_pitch() +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 21.1, yend = 21.1, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 36.8, yend = 36.8, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 63.2, yend = 63.2, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 78.9, yend = 78.9, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 17, xend = 17), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 33.2, xend = 33.2), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 50, xend = 50), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 66.4, xend = 66.4), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 83, xend = 83), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  
  # add zone percentage numbers
  geom_text(data = Oppoaverage_epvNZFT, aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste(PEPV, "%")), size = 4) +
  
  #geometrics
  stat_density_2d_filled(aes(level = EPV, fill = after_stat(level)), alpha = 0.8, adjust = 0.1, linewidth = 2) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Away) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = paste(Match_Oppo," Open Play EPV Heat Map - Full Game"), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher \nEPV, Box figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  My_caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

OppoEPVHeatMapplotFT

```


## Row 2

``` {r} 
#up to first subs map
#set time period
EPVHeatMapData1sub <- EPVHeatMapData %>%
  filter(minute <= firstSub)

#set EPV total for time period
HomeEPV1sub <- sum(EPVHeatMapData1sub$EPVvalue)

# Create a new variable to represent the zone for each observation
EPVHeatMapData1sub$zone_x <- cut(EPVHeatMapData1sub$x, breaks = c(0, 17, 33.2, 50, 66.4, 83, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)
EPVHeatMapData1sub$zone_y <- cut(EPVHeatMapData1sub$y, breaks = c(0, 21.1, 36.8, 63.2, 78.9, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)

# Calculate average EPV for each zone
average_epv1sub <- EPVHeatMapData1sub %>%
  group_by(zone_x, zone_y) %>%
  summarize(avg_epv = sum(EPVvalue, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(avg_epv = round(ifelse(avg_epv < 0, abs(avg_epv), avg_epv), 3),
         PEPV = round(avg_epv/HomeEPV1sub,3)) 

# Plot the tile plot
EPVMapplot1sub <- ggplot(average_epv1sub, aes(x = zone_x, y = zone_y, fill = avg_epv)) +
  theme_pitch() +
  
  #geometrics
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = PEPV, size = 3)) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_HomeC) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = "LFC Open Play EPV Heat Map - Up to first subs", 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher EPV, \nBox figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  My_caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

#calculate for combined tile and heat map
average_epvNZ1sub <- average_epv1sub %>%
  mutate(x = ifelse(zone_x == "[0,17]", 8.5,
                    ifelse(zone_x == "(17,33.2]", 25.1,
                           ifelse(zone_x == "(33.2,50]", 41.6,
```
