``` {r} 
                                  ifelse(zone_x == "(50,66.4]", 58.2,
                                         ifelse(zone_x == "(66.4,83]", 74.7,
                                                ifelse(zone_x == "(83,100]", 91.5, NA))))))) %>%
  mutate(y = ifelse(zone_y == "[0,21.1]", 10,
                    ifelse(zone_y == "(21.1,36.8]", 30,
                           ifelse(zone_y == "(36.8,63.2]", 50,
                                  ifelse(zone_y == "(63.2,78.9]", 70,
                                         ifelse(zone_y == "(78.9,100]", 90, NA))))))

average_epvNZ1sub <- average_epvNZ1sub %>%
  group_by(x, y) %>%
  summarise(avg_epv = sum(avg_epv, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(PEPV = 100*(round(avg_epv/HomeEPV1sub,2)))  


EPVHeatMapplot1sub <- EPVHeatMapData1sub %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_opta, fill = "#E5E5E5", colour = "#454545") +
  theme_pitch() +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 21.1, yend = 21.1, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 36.8, yend = 36.8, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 63.2, yend = 63.2, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 78.9, yend = 78.9, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 17, xend = 17), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 33.2, xend = 33.2), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 50, xend = 50), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 66.4, xend = 66.4), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 83, xend = 83), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  
  # add zone percentage numbers
  geom_text(data = average_epvNZ1sub, aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste(PEPV, "%")), size = 4) +
  
  #geometrics
  stat_density_2d_filled(aes(level = EPV, fill = after_stat(level)), alpha = 0.8, adjust = 0.1, linewidth = 2) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Home) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = "LFC Open Play EPV Heat Map - Up to first subs", 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher \nEPV, Box figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  My_caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

EPVHeatMapplot1sub

################################################################

```

``` {r} 
#Post first subs map
#set time period
EPVHeatMapDataP1sub <- EPVHeatMapData %>%
  filter(minute > firstSub)

#set EPV total for time period
HomeEPVP1sub <- sum(EPVHeatMapDataP1sub$EPVvalue)

# Create a new variable to represent the zone for each observation
EPVHeatMapDataP1sub$zone_x <- cut(EPVHeatMapDataP1sub$x, breaks = c(0, 17, 33.2, 50, 66.4, 83, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)
EPVHeatMapDataP1sub$zone_y <- cut(EPVHeatMapDataP1sub$y, breaks = c(0, 21.1, 36.8, 63.2, 78.9, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)

# Calculate average EPV for each zone
average_epvP1sub <- EPVHeatMapDataP1sub %>%
  group_by(zone_x, zone_y) %>%
  summarize(avg_epv = sum(EPVvalue, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(avg_epv = round(ifelse(avg_epv < 0, abs(avg_epv), avg_epv), 3),
         PEPV = round(avg_epv/HomeEPVP1sub,3)) 

# Plot the tile plot
EPVMapplotP1sub <- ggplot(average_epvP1sub, aes(x = zone_x, y = zone_y, fill = avg_epv)) +
  theme_pitch() +
  
  #geometrics
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = PEPV, size = 3)) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_HomeC) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = "LFC Open Play EPV Heat Map - Post First subs", 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher EPV, \nBox figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  My_caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))


#calculate for combined tile and heat map
average_epvNZP1sub <- average_epvP1sub %>%
  mutate(x = ifelse(zone_x == "[0,17]", 8.5,
                    ifelse(zone_x == "(17,33.2]", 25.1,
                           ifelse(zone_x == "(33.2,50]", 41.6,
                                  ifelse(zone_x == "(50,66.4]", 58.2,
                                         ifelse(zone_x == "(66.4,83]", 74.7,
                                                ifelse(zone_x == "(83,100]", 91.5, NA))))))) %>%
  mutate(y = ifelse(zone_y == "[0,21.1]", 10,
                    ifelse(zone_y == "(21.1,36.8]", 30,
                           ifelse(zone_y == "(36.8,63.2]", 50,
                                  ifelse(zone_y == "(63.2,78.9]", 70,
                                         ifelse(zone_y == "(78.9,100]", 90, NA))))))

average_epvNZP1sub <- average_epvNZP1sub %>%
  group_by(x, y) %>%
  summarise(avg_epv = sum(avg_epv, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(PEPV = 100*(round(avg_epv/HomeEPVP1sub,2)))  


EPVHeatMapplotP1sub <- EPVHeatMapDataP1sub %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_opta, fill = "#E5E5E5", colour = "#454545") +
  theme_pitch() +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 21.1, yend = 21.1, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 36.8, yend = 36.8, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 63.2, yend = 63.2, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 78.9, yend = 78.9, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 17, xend = 17), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 33.2, xend = 33.2), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 50, xend = 50), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 66.4, xend = 66.4), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 83, xend = 83), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  
  # add zone percentage numbers
  geom_text(data = average_epvNZP1sub, aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste(PEPV, "%")), size = 4) +
  
  #geometrics
  stat_density_2d_filled(aes(level = EPV, fill = after_stat(level)), alpha = 0.8, adjust = 0.1, linewidth = 2) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Home) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = "LFC Open Play EPV Heat Map - Post First Subs", 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher \nEPV, Box figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  My_caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

EPVHeatMapplotP1sub


########################################################
```

## Row 3 
``` {r}
#first subs
#set for time period
OppoEPVHeatMapData1sub <- OppoEPVHeatMapData %>%
  filter(minute <= firstSubOppo)

#set EPV total for time period
OppoEPV1sub <- sum(OppoEPVHeatMapData1sub$EPVvalue)


# Create a new variable to represent the zone for each observation
OppoEPVHeatMapData1sub$zone_x <- cut(OppoEPVHeatMapData1sub$x, breaks = c(0, 17, 33.2, 50, 66.4, 83, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)
OppoEPVHeatMapData1sub$zone_y <- cut(OppoEPVHeatMapData1sub$y, breaks = c(0, 21.1, 36.8, 63.2, 78.9, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)

# Calculate average EPV for each zone
Oppoaverage_epv1sub <- OppoEPVHeatMapData1sub %>%
  group_by(zone_x, zone_y) %>%
  summarize(avg_epv = sum(EPVvalue, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(avg_epv = round(ifelse(avg_epv < 0, abs(avg_epv), avg_epv), 3),
         PEPV = round(avg_epv/OppoEPV1sub,3)) 

# Plot the tile plot
OppoEPVMapplot1sub <- ggplot(Oppoaverage_epv1sub, aes(x = zone_x, y = zone_y, fill = avg_epv)) +
  theme_pitch() +
  
  #geometrics
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = PEPV, size = 3)) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_AwayC) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = paste(Match_Oppo," Open Play EPV Heat Map - Up to 1st Subs"), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher EPV, \nBox figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

#OppoEPVMapplot1sub

#save tile Map plot
#ggsave("Oppo Open Play EPV Tile Map 1st subs.png", width = 2500, height = 2150, units = "px", dpi = 400)


#calculate for combined tile and heat map
Oppoaverage_epvNZ1sub <- Oppoaverage_epv1sub %>%
  mutate(x = ifelse(zone_x == "[0,17]", 8.5,
                    ifelse(zone_x == "(17,33.2]", 25.1,
                           ifelse(zone_x == "(33.2,50]", 41.6,
                                  ifelse(zone_x == "(50,66.4]", 58.2,
                                         ifelse(zone_x == "(66.4,83]", 74.7,
                                                ifelse(zone_x == "(83,100]", 91.5, NA))))))) %>%
  mutate(y = ifelse(zone_y == "[0,21.1]", 10,
                    ifelse(zone_y == "(21.1,36.8]", 30,
                           ifelse(zone_y == "(36.8,63.2]", 50,
                                  ifelse(zone_y == "(63.2,78.9]", 70,
                                         ifelse(zone_y == "(78.9,100]", 90, NA))))))

Oppoaverage_epvNZ1sub <- Oppoaverage_epvNZ1sub %>%
  group_by(x, y) %>%
  summarise(avg_epv = sum(avg_epv, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(PEPV = 100*(round(avg_epv/OppoEPV1sub,2)))  


OppoEPVHeatMapplot1sub <- OppoEPVHeatMapData1sub %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_opta, fill = "#E5E5E5", colour = "#454545") +
  theme_pitch() +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 21.1, yend = 21.1, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 36.8, yend = 36.8, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 63.2, yend = 63.2, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 78.9, yend = 78.9, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 17, xend = 17), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 33.2, xend = 33.2), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 50, xend = 50), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 66.4, xend = 66.4), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 83, xend = 83), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  
  # add zone percentage numbers
  geom_text(data = Oppoaverage_epvNZ1sub, aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste(PEPV, "%")), size = 4) +
  
  #geometrics
  stat_density_2d_filled(aes(level = EPV, fill = after_stat(level)), alpha = 0.8, adjust = 0.1, linewidth = 2) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Away) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = paste(Match_Oppo," Open Play EPV Heat Map - Up to 1st Subs"), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher \nEPV, Box figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  My_caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

OppoEPVHeatMapplot1sub
```

``` {r}
###################################################
#post first subs
#set for time period
OppoEPVHeatMapDataP1sub <- OppoEPVHeatMapData %>%
  filter(minute > firstSubOppo)

#set EPV total for time period
OppoEPVP1sub <- sum(OppoEPVHeatMapDataP1sub$EPVvalue)


# Create a new variable to represent the zone for each observation
OppoEPVHeatMapDataP1sub$zone_x <- cut(OppoEPVHeatMapDataP1sub$x, breaks = c(0, 17, 33.2, 50, 66.4, 83, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)
OppoEPVHeatMapDataP1sub$zone_y <- cut(OppoEPVHeatMapDataP1sub$y, breaks = c(0, 21.1, 36.8, 63.2, 78.9, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)

# Calculate average EPV for each zone
Oppoaverage_epvP1sub <- OppoEPVHeatMapDataP1sub %>%
  group_by(zone_x, zone_y) %>%
  summarize(avg_epv = sum(EPVvalue, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(avg_epv = round(ifelse(avg_epv < 0, abs(avg_epv), avg_epv), 3),
         PEPV = round(avg_epv/OppoEPVP1sub,3)) 

# Plot the tile plot
OppoEPVMapplotP1sub <- ggplot(Oppoaverage_epvP1sub, aes(x = zone_x, y = zone_y, fill = avg_epv)) +
  theme_pitch() +
  
  #geometrics
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = PEPV, size = 3)) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_AwayC) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = paste(Match_Oppo," Open Play EPV Heat Map - Post 1st Subs"), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher EPV, \nBox figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

#OppoEPVMapplotP1sub

#save tile Map plot
#ggsave("Oppo Open Play EPV Tile Map Post 1st Subs.png", width = 2500, height = 2150, units = "px", dpi = 400)


#calculate for combined tile and heat map
Oppoaverage_epvNZP1sub <- Oppoaverage_epvP1sub %>%
  mutate(x = ifelse(zone_x == "[0,17]", 8.5,
                    ifelse(zone_x == "(17,33.2]", 25.1,
                           ifelse(zone_x == "(33.2,50]", 41.6,
                                  ifelse(zone_x == "(50,66.4]", 58.2,
                                         ifelse(zone_x == "(66.4,83]", 74.7,
                                                ifelse(zone_x == "(83,100]", 91.5, NA))))))) %>%
  mutate(y = ifelse(zone_y == "[0,21.1]", 10,
                    ifelse(zone_y == "(21.1,36.8]", 30,
                           ifelse(zone_y == "(36.8,63.2]", 50,
                                  ifelse(zone_y == "(63.2,78.9]", 70,
                                         ifelse(zone_y == "(78.9,100]", 90, NA))))))

Oppoaverage_epvNZP1sub <- Oppoaverage_epvNZP1sub %>%
  group_by(x, y) %>%
  summarise(avg_epv = sum(avg_epv, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(PEPV = 100*(round(avg_epv/OppoEPVP1sub,2)))  


OppoEPVHeatMapplotP1sub <- OppoEPVHeatMapDataP1sub %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_opta, fill = "#E5E5E5", colour = "#454545") +
  theme_pitch() +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 21.1, yend = 21.1, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 36.8, yend = 36.8, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 63.2, yend = 63.2, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 78.9, yend = 78.9, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 17, xend = 17), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 33.2, xend = 33.2), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 50, xend = 50), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 66.4, xend = 66.4), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 83, xend = 83), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  
  # add zone percentage numbers
  geom_text(data = Oppoaverage_epvNZP1sub, aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste(PEPV, "%")), size = 4) +
  
  #geometrics
  stat_density_2d_filled(aes(level = EPV, fill = after_stat(level)), alpha = 0.8, adjust = 0.1, linewidth = 2) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Away) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = paste(Match_Oppo," Open Play EPV Heat Map - Post 1st Subs"), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher \nEPV, Box figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  My_caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

OppoEPVHeatMapplotP1sub
```

## Row 4

``` {r} 
#first half EPV Mao
#set time period
EPVHeatMapData1H <- EPVHeatMapData %>%
  filter(period == 1)

#set EPV total for time period
HomeEPV1H <- sum(EPVHeatMapData1H$EPVvalue)

# Create a new variable to represent the zone for each observation
EPVHeatMapData1H$zone_x <- cut(EPVHeatMapData1H$x, breaks = c(0, 17, 33.2, 50, 66.4, 83, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)
EPVHeatMapData1H$zone_y <- cut(EPVHeatMapData1H$y, breaks = c(0, 21.1, 36.8, 63.2, 78.9, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)

# Calculate average EPV for each zone
average_epv1H <- EPVHeatMapData1H %>%
  group_by(zone_x, zone_y) %>%
  summarize(avg_epv = sum(EPVvalue, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(avg_epv = round(ifelse(avg_epv < 0, abs(avg_epv), avg_epv), 3),
         PEPV = round(avg_epv/HomeEPV1H,3)) 

#calculate for combined tile and heat map
average_epvNZ1H <- average_epv1H %>%
  mutate(x = ifelse(zone_x == "[0,17]", 8.5,
                    ifelse(zone_x == "(17,33.2]", 25.1,
                           ifelse(zone_x == "(33.2,50]", 41.6,
                                  ifelse(zone_x == "(50,66.4]", 58.2,
                                         ifelse(zone_x == "(66.4,83]", 74.7,
                                                ifelse(zone_x == "(83,100]", 91.5, NA))))))) %>%
  mutate(y = ifelse(zone_y == "[0,21.1]", 10,
                    ifelse(zone_y == "(21.1,36.8]", 30,
                           ifelse(zone_y == "(36.8,63.2]", 50,
                                  ifelse(zone_y == "(63.2,78.9]", 70,
                                         ifelse(zone_y == "(78.9,100]", 90, NA))))))

average_epvNZ1H <- average_epvNZ1H %>%
  group_by(x, y) %>%
  summarise(avg_epv = sum(avg_epv, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(PEPV = 100*(round(avg_epv/HomeEPV1H,2)))  

EPVHeatMapplot1H <- EPVHeatMapData1H %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_opta, fill = "#E5E5E5", colour = "#454545") +
  theme_pitch() +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 21.1, yend = 21.1, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 36.8, yend = 36.8, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 63.2, yend = 63.2, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 78.9, yend = 78.9, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 17, xend = 17), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 33.2, xend = 33.2), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 50, xend = 50), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 66.4, xend = 66.4), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 83, xend = 83), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  
  # add zone percentage numbers
  geom_text(data = average_epvNZ1H, aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste(PEPV, "%")), size = 4) +
  
  #geometrics
  stat_density_2d_filled(aes(level = EPV, fill = after_stat(level)), alpha = 0.8, adjust = 0.1, linewidth = 2) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Home) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = "LFC Open Play EPV Heat Map - First Half", 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher \nEPV, Box figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  My_caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

EPVHeatMapplot1H


########################################################



```

``` {r}  
#Second half EPV Mao
#set time period
EPVHeatMapData2H <- EPVHeatMapData %>%
  filter(period == 2)

#set EPV total for time period
HomeEPV2H <- sum(EPVHeatMapData2H$EPVvalue)

# Create a new variable to represent the zone for each observation
EPVHeatMapData2H$zone_x <- cut(EPVHeatMapData2H$x, breaks = c(0, 17, 33.2, 50, 66.4, 83, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)
EPVHeatMapData2H$zone_y <- cut(EPVHeatMapData2H$y, breaks = c(0, 21.1, 36.8, 63.2, 78.9, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)

# Calculate average EPV for each zone
average_epv2H <- EPVHeatMapData2H %>%
  group_by(zone_x, zone_y) %>%
  summarize(avg_epv = sum(EPVvalue, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(avg_epv = round(ifelse(avg_epv < 0, abs(avg_epv), avg_epv), 3),
         PEPV = round(avg_epv/HomeEPV2H,3)) 

#calculate for combined tile and heat map
average_epvNZ2H <- average_epv2H %>%
  mutate(x = ifelse(zone_x == "[0,17]", 8.5,
                    ifelse(zone_x == "(17,33.2]", 25.1,
                           ifelse(zone_x == "(33.2,50]", 41.6,
                                  ifelse(zone_x == "(50,66.4]", 58.2,
                                         ifelse(zone_x == "(66.4,83]", 74.7,
                                                ifelse(zone_x == "(83,100]", 91.5, NA))))))) %>%
  mutate(y = ifelse(zone_y == "[0,21.1]", 10,
                    ifelse(zone_y == "(21.1,36.8]", 30,
                           ifelse(zone_y == "(36.8,63.2]", 50,
                                  ifelse(zone_y == "(63.2,78.9]", 70,
                                         ifelse(zone_y == "(78.9,100]", 90, NA))))))

average_epvNZ2H <- average_epvNZ2H %>%
  group_by(x, y) %>%
  summarise(avg_epv = sum(avg_epv, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(PEPV = 100*(round(avg_epv/HomeEPV2H,2)))  

EPVHeatMapplot2H <- EPVHeatMapData2H %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_opta, fill = "#E5E5E5", colour = "#454545") +
  theme_pitch() +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 21.1, yend = 21.1, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 36.8, yend = 36.8, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 63.2, yend = 63.2, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 78.9, yend = 78.9, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 17, xend = 17), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 33.2, xend = 33.2), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 50, xend = 50), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 66.4, xend = 66.4), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 83, xend = 83), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  
  # add zone percentage numbers
  geom_text(data = average_epvNZ2H, aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste(PEPV, "%")), size = 4) +
  
  #geometrics
  stat_density_2d_filled(aes(level = EPV, fill = after_stat(level)), alpha = 0.8, adjust = 0.1, linewidth = 2) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Home) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = "LFC Open Play EPV Heat Map - Second Half", 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher \nEPV, Box figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  My_caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

EPVHeatMapplot2H

```
## Row 5
```{r}
#| output: false
#first half
#set for time period
OppoEPVHeatMapData1H <- OppoEPVHeatMapData %>%
  filter(period == 1)

#set EPV total for time period
OppoEPV1H <- sum(OppoEPVHeatMapData1H$EPVvalue)


# Create a new variable to represent the zone for each observation
OppoEPVHeatMapData1H$zone_x <- cut(OppoEPVHeatMapData1H$x, breaks = c(0, 17, 33.2, 50, 66.4, 83, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)
OppoEPVHeatMapData1H$zone_y <- cut(OppoEPVHeatMapData1H$y, breaks = c(0, 21.1, 36.8, 63.2, 78.9, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)

# Calculate average EPV for each zone
Oppoaverage_epv1H <- OppoEPVHeatMapData1H %>%
  group_by(zone_x, zone_y) %>%
  summarize(avg_epv = sum(EPVvalue, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(avg_epv = round(ifelse(avg_epv < 0, abs(avg_epv), avg_epv), 3),
         PEPV = round(avg_epv/OppoEPV1H,3)) 

# Plot the tile plot
OppoEPVMapplot1H <- Oppoaverage_epv1H %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = zone_x, y = zone_y, fill = avg_epv)) +
  theme_pitch() +
  
  #geometrics
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = PEPV, size = 3)) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_AwayC) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = paste(Match_Oppo," Open Play EPV Heat Map - 1st Half"), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher EPV, \nBox figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

#OppoEPVMapplot1H

#save tile Map plot
#ggsave("Oppo Open Play EPV Tile Map 1st Half.png", width = 2500, height = 2150, units = "px", dpi = 400)


#calculate for combined tile and heat map
Oppoaverage_epvNZ1H <- Oppoaverage_epv1H %>%
  mutate(x = ifelse(zone_x == "[0,17]", 8.5,
                    ifelse(zone_x == "(17,33.2]", 25.1,
                           ifelse(zone_x == "(33.2,50]", 41.6,
                                  ifelse(zone_x == "(50,66.4]", 58.2,
                                         ifelse(zone_x == "(66.4,83]", 74.7,
                                                ifelse(zone_x == "(83,100]", 91.5, NA))))))) %>%
  mutate(y = ifelse(zone_y == "[0,21.1]", 10,
                    ifelse(zone_y == "(21.1,36.8]", 30,
                           ifelse(zone_y == "(36.8,63.2]", 50,
                                  ifelse(zone_y == "(63.2,78.9]", 70,
                                         ifelse(zone_y == "(78.9,100]", 90, NA))))))

Oppoaverage_epvNZ1H <- Oppoaverage_epvNZ1H %>%
  group_by(x, y) %>%
  summarise(avg_epv = sum(avg_epv, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(PEPV = 100*(round(avg_epv/OppoEPV1H,2)))  

```

``` {r}
OppoEPVHeatMapplot1H <- OppoEPVHeatMapData1H %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_opta, fill = "#E5E5E5", colour = "#454545") +
  theme_pitch() +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 21.1, yend = 21.1, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 36.8, yend = 36.8, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 63.2, yend = 63.2, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 78.9, yend = 78.9, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 17, xend = 17), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 33.2, xend = 33.2), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 50, xend = 50), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 66.4, xend = 66.4), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 83, xend = 83), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  
  # add zone percentage numbers
  geom_text(data = Oppoaverage_epvNZ1H, aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste(PEPV, "%")), size = 4) +
  
  #geometrics
  stat_density_2d_filled(aes(level = EPV, fill = after_stat(level)), alpha = 0.8, adjust = 0.1, linewidth = 2) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Away) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = paste(Match_Oppo," Open Play EPV Heat Map - 1st Half"), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher \nEPV, Box figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  My_caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

OppoEPVHeatMapplot1H


#save Heat Map plot
#ggsave("Oppo Open Play EPV Heat Map 1st Half.png", width = 2500, height = 2150, units = "px", dpi = 400)
#return to main directory
```

``` {r}
######################################################################
#Second half
#set for time period
OppoEPVHeatMapData2H <- OppoEPVHeatMapData %>%
  filter(period == 2)

#set EPV total for time period
OppoEPV2H <- sum(OppoEPVHeatMapData2H$EPVvalue)


# Create a new variable to represent the zone for each observation
OppoEPVHeatMapData2H$zone_x <- cut(OppoEPVHeatMapData2H$x, breaks = c(0, 17, 33.2, 50, 66.4, 83, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)
OppoEPVHeatMapData2H$zone_y <- cut(OppoEPVHeatMapData2H$y, breaks = c(0, 21.1, 36.8, 63.2, 78.9, 100), include.lowest = TRUE)

# Calculate average EPV for each zone
Oppoaverage_epv2H <- OppoEPVHeatMapData2H %>%
  group_by(zone_x, zone_y) %>%
  summarize(avg_epv = sum(EPVvalue, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(avg_epv = round(ifelse(avg_epv < 0, abs(avg_epv), avg_epv), 3),
         PEPV = round(avg_epv/OppoEPV2H,3)) 

# Plot the tile plot
OppoEPVMapplot2H <- Oppoaverage_epv2H %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = zone_x, y = zone_y, fill = avg_epv)) +
  theme_pitch() +
  
  #geometrics
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = PEPV, size = 3)) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_AwayC) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = paste(Match_Oppo," Open Play EPV Heat Map - 2nd Half"), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher EPV, \nBox figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

#OppoEPVMapplot2H


#calculate for combined tile and heat map
Oppoaverage_epvNZ2H <- Oppoaverage_epv2H %>%
  mutate(x = ifelse(zone_x == "[0,17]", 8.5,
                    ifelse(zone_x == "(17,33.2]", 25.1,
                           ifelse(zone_x == "(33.2,50]", 41.6,
                                  ifelse(zone_x == "(50,66.4]", 58.2,
                                         ifelse(zone_x == "(66.4,83]", 74.7,
                                                ifelse(zone_x == "(83,100]", 91.5, NA))))))) %>%
  mutate(y = ifelse(zone_y == "[0,21.1]", 10,
                    ifelse(zone_y == "(21.1,36.8]", 30,
                           ifelse(zone_y == "(36.8,63.2]", 50,
                                  ifelse(zone_y == "(63.2,78.9]", 70,
                                         ifelse(zone_y == "(78.9,100]", 90, NA))))))

Oppoaverage_epvNZ2H <- Oppoaverage_epvNZ2H %>%
  group_by(x, y) %>%
  summarise(avg_epv = sum(avg_epv, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(PEPV = 100*(round(avg_epv/OppoEPV2H,2)))  
```

```{r}

OppoEPVHeatMapplot2H <- OppoEPVHeatMapData2H %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_opta, fill = "#E5E5E5", colour = "#454545") +
  theme_pitch() +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 21.1, yend = 21.1, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 36.8, yend = 36.8, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 63.2, yend = 63.2, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 78.9, yend = 78.9, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 17, xend = 17), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 33.2, xend = 33.2), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 50, xend = 50), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 66.4, xend = 66.4), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 83, xend = 83), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  
  # add zone percentage numbers
  geom_text(data = Oppoaverage_epvNZ2H, aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste(PEPV, "%")), size = 4) +
  
  #geometrics
  stat_density_2d_filled(aes(level = EPV, fill = after_stat(level)), alpha = 0.8, adjust = 0.1, linewidth = 2) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Away) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = paste(Match_Oppo," Open Play EPV Heat Map - 2nd Half"), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture,"  \nDirection of play Left to Right, Increased Colour = Higher \nEPV, Box figures = % of Total EPV"),
       caption =  My_caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

OppoEPVHeatMapplot2H

```
# xG Analysis

## Row 1 

``` {r}

# Line Plot
  
xGLinePlot <- dashboard_data %>%
  ggplot() +
  
  #Geometrics
  #xg line
  geom_line(aes(x = expandedMinute, y = TotalxG), linewidth = 2, colour = Color_LFC) +
  
  #npXg line
  geom_line(aes(x = expandedMinute, y = TotalNPxG), linewidth = 1, colour = Color_LFC, linetype = "dashed") +
  
  #xGOT line
  geom_line(aes(x = expandedMinute, y = TotalxGOT), linewidth = 1, colour = "grey4") +
  
  #Half time marker
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = max(TotalxG), x = 45, xend = 45), linewidth = 0.8, colour = "black", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_text(aes(x = 45, y = max(TotalxG), label = "HT"), colour = "black", vjust = -1, size = 4) +
  
  #add ball imae for goals
  geom_image(inherit.aes = FALSE, mapping = aes(x = Goal_point_X, y = Goal_point_Y, image = "~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/Icons/ball2.png"), size = 0.025) +
  geom_label_repel(aes(x = Goal_point_X, y = Goal_point_Y, label = paste0(type, " Min:", expandedMinute, "\nxG:", xG)), size = 3) +

  #formatting
  expand_limits(x = 0, y = 0) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, 15)) +
  labs(x = "Match Time (mins)", 
       y = "xG, NPxG, xGOT",
       title = paste0(Match_LFC, " ", xGlineTitle_text), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture," ", Data_type))  +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_markdown(),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 8),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "#454545", linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_line(colour = "#454545", linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"),
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank())

xGLinePlot

#xGLinePlot_I <- ggplotly(xGLinePlot)
#xGLinePlot_I

```

```{r}
# Line Plot
#canvas
xGLinePlotOppo <- Oppodashboard_data %>%
  ggplot() +
  
  #Geometrics
  #plot xg line
  geom_line(aes(x = expandedMinute, y = TotalxG), linewidth = 2, colour = Color_Oppo) +
  
  #npXg line
  geom_line(aes(x = expandedMinute, y = TotalNPxG), linewidth = 1, colour = Color_Oppo, linetype = "dashed") +
  
  #xGOT line
  geom_line(aes(x = expandedMinute, y = TotalxGOT), linewidth = 1, colour = "grey4") +
  
  #Half time marker
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = max(TotalxG), x = 45, xend = 45), linewidth = 0.8, colour = "black", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_text(aes(x = 45, y = max(TotalxG), label = "HT"), colour = "black", vjust = -1, size = 4) +
  
  #add ball image for goals
  geom_image(inherit.aes = FALSE, mapping = aes(x = Goal_point_X, y = Goal_point_Y, image = "~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/Icons/ball2.png"), size = 0.025) +
  geom_label_repel(aes(x = Goal_point_X, y = Goal_point_Y, label = paste0(type, " Min:", expandedMinute, "\nxG:", xG)), size = 3) +
  

  #formatting
  expand_limits(x = 0, y = 0) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, 15)) +
  labs(x = "Match Time (mins)", 
       y = "xG, NPxG, xGOT",
       title = paste0(Match_Oppo, " ", OppoxGlineTitle_text), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture," ", Data_type))  +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_markdown(),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 8),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "#454545", linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_line(colour = "#454545", linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"),
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank())

xGLinePlotOppo
```

## Row 2

``` {r}
#Load data (opta Data)
dashboard_data <- plottingData

#Dashboard data wrangling all data
dashboard_data <- dashboard_data %>%
  filter(teamId == Match_LFC) %>%
  filter(TotalShots == 1) %>%
  filter(!situation == "NA") %>%
  mutate(TotalxG = cumsum(xG)) %>%
  mutate(TotalNPxG = cumsum(NPxG)) %>%
  mutate(TotalxGOT = cumsum(xGOT)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_X = ifelse(str_detect(Goals, "1"), paste0(expandedMinute), NA)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_Y = ifelse(str_detect(Goals, "1"), paste0(TotalxG), NA)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_X = as.numeric(Goal_point_X)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_Y = as.numeric(Goal_point_Y)) %>%
  select(x, y, Goal_point_Y, Goal_point_X, TotalxG, TotalNPxG, TotalxGOT, situation, teamId, TotalShots, xG, NPxG, xGOT, expandedMinute, type)

#Dashboard plots
# Density Shot Map

#canvas
xGDensityPlot <- dashboard_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_opta, fill = "#E5E5E5", colour = "#454545") +
  theme_pitch() +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 21.1, yend = 21.1, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 36.8, yend = 36.8, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 63.2, yend = 63.2, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 78.9, yend = 78.9, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 17, xend = 17), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 33.2, xend = 33.2), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 50, xend = 50), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 66.4, xend = 66.4), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 83, xend = 83), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  
  # add zone numbers
  geom_text(aes(y = 50, x = 74.7, label = "14"), size = 3, color = "grey", show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(y = 71.05, x = 74.7, label = "LHS"), size = 3, color = "grey", show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(y = 28.95, x = 74.7, label = "RHS"), size = 3, color = "grey", show.legend = FALSE) +
  
  #geometrics
  stat_density_2d(aes(color = after_stat(level), fill = after_stat(level), text = paste("xG: ", ..level..)), geom = "polygon", alpha = 0.4, linewidth = 1) +
  #geom_density_2d(aes(color = after_stat(level), fill = after_stat(level), text = paste("xG: ", ..level..)), alpha = 0.7, linewidth = 1.5) +
  scale_color_paletteer_c(ColorScale_HomeC) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_HomeC) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "xG Level")) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "xG Level")) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(0.5, 7)) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = paste0(Match_LFC," xG Density Areas"), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture," ", Data_type),
       fill = "xG Level",
       color = "xG Level",
        caption = "Darker Colour + Tighter Lines = Higher xG") +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        panel.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        plot.caption =  element_text(colour = "black", size = 8),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

xGDensityPlot_I <- ggplotly(xGDensityPlot, tooltip = "text")
xGDensityPlot_I

```

``` {r}
#Oppo dashboard
#Load data (Understat Data)
Oppodashboard_data <- plottingData

Oppodashboard_data <- Oppodashboard_data %>%
  filter(teamId == Match_Oppo) %>%
  filter(TotalShots == 1) %>%
  filter(!situation == "NA") %>%
  mutate(TotalxG = cumsum(xG)) %>%
  mutate(TotalNPxG = cumsum(NPxG)) %>%
  mutate(TotalxGOT = cumsum(xGOT)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_X = ifelse(str_detect(Goals, "1"), paste0(expandedMinute), NA)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_Y = ifelse(str_detect(Goals, "1"), paste0(TotalxG), NA)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_X = as.numeric(Goal_point_X)) %>%
  mutate(Goal_point_Y = as.numeric(Goal_point_Y)) %>%
  select(x, y, Goal_point_Y, Goal_point_X, TotalxG, TotalNPxG, TotalxGOT, situation, teamId, TotalShots, xG, NPxG, xGOT, expandedMinute, type)


#Dashboard plots
# Density Shot Map

#canvas
xGDensityPlotOppo <- Oppodashboard_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_opta, fill = "#E5E5E5", colour = "#454545") +
  theme_pitch() +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 21.1, yend = 21.1, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 36.8, yend = 36.8, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 63.2, yend = 63.2, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 78.9, yend = 78.9, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 17, xend = 17), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 33.2, xend = 33.2), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 50, xend = 50), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 66.4, xend = 66.4), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 83, xend = 83), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
  
  # add zone numbers
  geom_text(aes(y = 50, x = 74.7, label = "14"), size = 3, color = "grey", show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(y = 71.05, x = 74.7, label = "LHS"), size = 3, color = "grey", show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(y = 28.95, x = 74.7, label = "RHS"), size = 3, color = "grey", show.legend = FALSE) +
   
  #geometrics
    stat_density_2d(aes(color = after_stat(level), fill = after_stat(level), text = paste("xG: ", ..level..)), geom = "polygon", alpha = 0.4, linewidth = 1) +
#  geom_density_2d(aes(color = after_stat(level), fill = after_stat(level), text = paste("xG: ", ..level..)), alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 1.5) +
  scale_color_paletteer_c(ColorScale_AwayC) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_AwayC) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "xG Level")) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "xG Level")) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(0.5, 7)) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = paste0(Match_Oppo," xG Density Areas"), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture," ", Data_type),
       caption = "Darker Colour + Tighter Lines = Higher xG") +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        panel.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        plot.caption =  element_text(colour = "black", size = 8),
        legend.position = "bottom", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"), 
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#E5E5E5"))

xGDensityPlotOppo_I <- ggplotly(xGDensityPlotOppo, tooltip = "text")
xGDensityPlotOppo_I
```



## Row 3

``` {r}
ShotBubblexG_data <- plottingData 

ShotBubblexG_data <- ShotBubblexG_data %>%
  filter(teamId == Match_LFC)

ShotBubblexG_data <- ShotBubblexG_data %>%
group_by(expandedMinute, Game_Period) %>%
  summarize(
    Attempted_Passes = sum(Attempted_Passes),
    Touches = sum(Touches),
    OFShots = sum(OFShots),
    OTShots = sum(OTShots),
    Goals = sum(Goals),
    xG = sum(xG),
    EPV = sum(EPV),
    TotalShots = sum(TotalShots),) %>%
  filter(OFShots > 0 | OTShots > 0 | Goals > 0 )

xGBubblePlot_data <- ShotBubblexG_data %>% 
  select(Game_Period, expandedMinute, Attempted_Passes, Touches, OFShots, OTShots, Goals, xG, EPV)

xGBubblePlot_data <- xGBubblePlot_data %>%
  group_by(Game_Period) %>%
  mutate(xG = round(xG,2)) %>%
  mutate(EPV = round(EPV,2)) %>%
  summarize(
    Attempted_Passes = sum(Attempted_Passes),
    Touches = sum(Touches),
    OFShots = sum(OFShots),
    OTShots = sum(OTShots),
    Goals = sum(Goals),
    xG = sum(xG),
    EPV = sum(EPV),
    TotalShots = sum(OFShots + OTShots + Goals),
  )  

#set plot size range
sizeRange <- c(1, 10)

#load final data frame for plot
xGBubble_Plot <- xGBubblePlot_data %>%

  #Canvas
  ggplot(aes(x = Attempted_Passes, y = TotalShots)) +
  
  #geometrics
  #xG bubble
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Home, 1) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_HomeC, 1) +
  geom_point(aes(size = xG, fill = xG), shape = 21, colour = "black", stroke = 0.5, alpha = 0.9) +
  #EPV Bubble
  new_scale_fill() +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Home, 1) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_HomeC, 1) +
  geom_point(aes(size = EPV, fill = EPV), shape = 23, colour = "black", stroke = 0.5, alpha = 0.5) +
  #Labels
  new_scale_fill() +  
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Home, 1) +
  geom_label_repel(aes(x = Attempted_Passes, y = TotalShots, label = paste0("Time: ", Game_Period,"\nxG: ", xG, " EPV: ", EPV)), fill = "white", size = 2.5) +
  
  #Scale and limits
  scale_size(range = sizeRange) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, max(xGBubblePlot_data$Attempted_Passes))) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(xGBubblePlot_data$TotalShots))) +
  

  #formatting
  labs(title = paste0(Match_LFC, " xG (Circles) & EPV (Diamonds) Production by Time Period"),
         subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture," ", Data_type),
         caption = My_caption,
         x = "Passes",
         y = "Shots") +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "Black", size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "Black", face = "bold", size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "Black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "#454545", size = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"),
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_line(colour = "#454545", size = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"),
        panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "vertical",
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_blank())

xGBubble_Plot
```

``` {r}
OppoShotBubblexG_data <- plottingData 

OppoShotBubblexG_data <- OppoShotBubblexG_data %>%
  filter(teamId == Match_Oppo)

OppoShotBubblexG_data <- OppoShotBubblexG_data %>%
  group_by(expandedMinute, Game_Period) %>%
  summarize(
Attempted_Passes = sum(Attempted_Passes),
Touches = sum(Touches),
OFShots = sum(OFShots),
OTShots = sum(OTShots),
Goals = sum(Goals),
xG = sum(xG),
EPV = sum(EPV),
TotalShots = sum(TotalShots),) %>%
  filter(OFShots > 0 | OTShots > 0 | Goals > 0 )

xGOppoBubblePlot_data <- OppoShotBubblexG_data %>% 
  select(Game_Period, expandedMinute, Attempted_Passes, Touches, OFShots, OTShots, Goals, xG, EPV)

xGOppoBubblePlot_data <- xGOppoBubblePlot_data %>%
  group_by(Game_Period) %>%
  mutate(xG = round(xG,2)) %>%
  mutate(EPV = round(EPV,2)) %>%
  summarize(
    Attempted_Passes = sum(Attempted_Passes),
    Touches = sum(Touches),
    OFShots = sum(OFShots),
    OTShots = sum(OTShots),
    Goals = sum(Goals),
    xG = sum(xG),
    EPV = sum(EPV),
    TotalShots = sum(OFShots + OTShots + Goals),) 


#set plot size range
sizeRange <- c(2, 9)

#load final data frame for plot
OppoxGBubble_Plot <- xGOppoBubblePlot_data %>%
  
  #Canvas
  ggplot(aes(x = Attempted_Passes, y = TotalShots, size = xG, tooltip = paste("xG:", xG, " EPV:", EPV) )) +
  
  #geometrics
  #xG bubble
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Away, 1) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_AwayC, 1) +
  geom_point_interactive(aes(size = xG, fill = xG), shape = 21, colour = "black", stroke = 0.5, alpha = 0.9) +
  #EPV Bubble
  new_scale_fill() +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Away, 1) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_c(ColorScale_AwayC, 1) +
  geom_point_interactive(aes(size = EPV, fill = EPV), shape = 23, colour = "black", stroke = 0.5, alpha = 0.5) +
  #Labels
  new_scale_fill() +  
  scale_fill_paletteer_d(ColorScale_Away, 1) +
  geom_label_repel(aes(x = Attempted_Passes, y = TotalShots, label = paste0("Time: ", Game_Period,"\nxG: ", xG, " EPV: ", EPV)), fill = "white", size = 2.5) +
  
  #Scale and limits
  scale_size(range = sizeRange) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, max(xGOppoBubblePlot_data$Attempted_Passes))) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(xGOppoBubblePlot_data$TotalShots))) +
  
  
  #formatting
  labs(title = paste0(Match_Oppo, " xG (Circle) & EPV (Diamond) Production by Time Period"),
         subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture," ", Data_type),
         x = "Passes",
         y = "Shots",
         caption = My_caption) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "Black", size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "Black", face = "bold", size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "Black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "#454545", size = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"),
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_line(colour = "#454545", size = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"),
        panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "vertical",
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_blank())

OppoxGBubble_Plot

#OppoxGBubble_Plot_I <- ggplotly(OppoxGBubble_Plot, tooltip = paste("xG:", "xG", " EPV:", "EPV"))

#OppoxGBubble_Plot_I

#girafe(ggobj = OppoxGBubble_Plot)
```

## Row 4

``` {r}
# Bar Plot

xGSituationBarData <- dashboard_data %>%
    group_by(situation) %>%
  summarize(
    xG = sum(xG))
  
  #canvas
xGSituationBar <- xGSituationBarData %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = xG, y = situation)) +
  
  #Geometrics
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = Color_LFC, colour = Color_LFC) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(y = "", 
       x = "xG",
       title = paste0(Match_LFC," xG Creation By Situation"), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture," ", Data_type)) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        panel.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "#454545", linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_line(colour = "#454545", linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"))

xGSituationBar_I <- ggplotly(xGSituationBar, tooltip = "xG")

xGSituationBar_I

```

``` {r}
# Bar Plot
xGSituationBarOppoData <- Oppodashboard_data %>%
    group_by(situation) %>%
  summarize(
    xG = sum(xG))

#canvas
xGSituationBarOppo <- xGSituationBarOppoData %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = xG, y = situation)) +
  
  #Geometrics
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = Color_Oppo, colour = Color_Oppo) +
  
  #formatting
  labs(y = "", 
       x = "xG",
       title = paste0(Match_Oppo, " xG Creation By Situation"), 
       subtitle = paste0(Match_Fixture," ", Data_type)) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        panel.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "#454545", linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_line(colour = "#454545", linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"))



xGSituationBarOppo_I <- ggplotly(xGSituationBarOppo, tooltip = "xG")

xGSituationBarOppo_I
```

# Shot Analysis

```{r shot map function}
#' Function for plotting shots for a team

plot_shot_AI <- function(data, type = "", teamColor = "#B22222",  bins = 30, highlight_goals = "", average_location = "", matchFixture = "", mapName = "", mapType = "", matchDate = "", dataSource = "", logo = "", wrap = "") {
  
  # Checking data frame   
  if ((nrow(data) > 0) &&
      sum(c("minute", "X", "Y", "xG", "result", "player", "home_team", "away_team") %in% names(data)) == 8) {

    # set plot names
    if (dataSource == "UnderStat") {
      
      if (mapType == "Home") {
      
        home_team <- (data$home_team[nrow(data)]) 
        shot_name <- paste(home_team, "Shot Map")  
      
      } else if (mapType == "Away") {
      
        away_team <- (data$away_team[nrow(data)]) 
        shot_name <- paste(away_team, "Shot Map")  
      
      } else if (mapType == "Player") {  
      
        last <- sub(".* ", "", data$player[nrow(data)])
        first <- sub(" .*", "", data$player[nrow(data)])
        player_name <- paste(first, last)
      
        shot_name <- paste(player_name, "Shot Map")
      } else if (mapType == "") {  
      
        shot_name <- paste(mapName, "Shot Map")
      }
      
    }else if (dataSource == "FotMob") {
      if (mapType == "Home") {
        
        home_team <- (data$home_team[nrow(data)]) 
        shot_name <- paste(home_team, "Shot Map")  
        
      } else if (mapType == "Away") {
        
        away_team <- (data$away_team[nrow(data)]) 
        shot_name <- paste(away_team, "Shot Map")  
        
      } else if (mapType == "Player") {  
        
        last <- (data$last_name[nrow(data)])
        first <- (data$first_name[nrow(data)])
        player_name <- paste(first, last)
        
        shot_name <- paste(player_name, "Shot Map")
      
      } else if (mapType == "") {  
      
        shot_name <- paste(mapName, "Shot Map")
      }
    }
      
    fixture_name <- paste(matchFixture, "(",dataSource,")")
    
    # set Plot Colours and scale
    fill_b <- "#E5E5E5"
    color_b <- "black"
    colorLine <- "#95A5A6"
    colorText <- "black"
    fill_Goal <- c("No Goal" = fill_b, "Goal" = teamColor)
    
    # Data Wrangling 
    if (dataSource == "UnderStat") {
      data <- data %>%
        mutate(X = 100 * X) %>%
        mutate(Y = 100 * Y)
      
     } else if (dataSource == "FotMob") {
        data <- data %>%
             mutate(X = (X * 0.941050375),
                    Y = (Y * 1.464079972))
      }
    
    if (nrow(data) >= 1) {
      data <- data %>%
        mutate(xG = round(xG,2)) %>%
        mutate(isGoal = ifelse(result == "Goal", "Goal", "No Goal")) %>%
        mutate('Game_Period' = ifelse(minute < 16, "0 - 15",
                                      ifelse(minute < 31 & minute > 15, "16 - 30",
                                             ifelse(minute < 46 & minute > 30, "31 - 45",
                                                    ifelse(minute < 61 & minute > 45, "46 - 60",
                                                           ifelse(minute < 76 & minute > 60, "61 - 75",
                                                                  ifelse(minute < 91 & minute > 75, "76 - 90",
                                                                         ifelse(minute > 90, "90 +", NA))))))))

              # set the pitch up
              plot <- data %>%
                ggplot() +
                annotate_pitch(dimensions = pitch_opta, colour = color_b, fill = fill_b) +
                theme_pitch() +
                geom_segment(aes(y = 21.1, yend = 21.1, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
                geom_segment(aes(y = 36.8, yend = 36.8, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
                geom_segment(aes(y = 63.2, yend = 63.2, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
                geom_segment(aes(y = 78.9, yend = 78.9, x = 0, xend = 100), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
                geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 17, xend = 17), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
                geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 33.2, xend = 33.2), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
                geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 50, xend = 50), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
                geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 66.4, xend = 66.4), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
                geom_segment(aes(y = 0, yend = 100, x = 83, xend = 83), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#95A5A6", linetype = "longdash") +
                
                # add zone numbers
                geom_text(aes(y = 50, x = 74.7, label = "14"), size = 3, color = "grey", show.legend = FALSE) +
                geom_text(aes(y = 71.05, x = 74.7, label = "LHS"), size = 3, color = "grey", show.legend = FALSE) +
                geom_text(aes(y = 28.95, x = 74.7, label = "RHS"), size = 3, color = "grey", show.legend = FALSE)
              
              # geometrics 
              if (average_location == TRUE || average_location == "") {
                
                if (type == "point" || type == "") {
                  
                  if (highlight_goals == FALSE || highlight_goals == "") { ## Don't highlight goals ----
                    plot  <- plot +
                      geom_point(data = data, aes(x = X,  y = Y, size = xG, color = result, text = paste("Player:", player, "\nMin:", minute, "\nxG", xG)), alpha = 0.7, stroke = 0.5) +
                      scale_size_continuous(range = c(0.5, 6)) +
                      geom_vline(xintercept = mean(data$X), color = colorLine, linetype = 2, linewidth = 1.5) +
                      geom_hline(yintercept = mean(data$Y), color = colorLine, linetype = 2, linewidth = 1.5) +
                      labs(
                        fill = "Result & xG of Shot",
                        color = "Result & xG of Shot",
                        size = "",
                      )
                  } else if (highlight_goals == TRUE) { ## Highlight goals ----
                    
                    plot <- plot +
                      geom_point(data = data, aes(x = X,  y = Y, size = xG, fill = isGoal, text = paste("Player:", player, "\nMin:", minute, "\nxG", xG)), color = color_b, shape = 21, alpha = 0.7, stroke = 0.5) +
                      scale_fill_manual(values = fill_Goal) +
                      scale_size_continuous(range = c(0.5, 6)) +
                      geom_vline(xintercept = mean(data$X), color = colorLine, linetype = 2, linewidth = 1.5) +
                      geom_hline(yintercept = mean(data$Y), color = colorLine, linetype = 2, linewidth = 1.5) +
                      labs(
                        fill = "Result & xG of Shot",
                        color = "Result & xG of Shot",
                        size = ""
                      )
                  } 
                } else if (type == "density") { ## DENSITY ----
                  plot <- plot +
                    stat_density_2d(data = data, aes(x = X, y = Y, fill = ..level..), geom = "polygon", alpha = 0.7) +
                    scale_fill_gradient(high = teamColor, low = "#01141D") +
                    scale_size_continuous(range = c(0.5, 6)) +
                    geom_vline(xintercept = mean(data$X), color = colorLine, linetype = 2, linewidth = 1.5) +
                    geom_hline(yintercept = mean(data$Y), color = colorLine, linetype = 2, linewidth = 1.5) +
                    theme(legend.position = "none")
                  
                } else if (type == "hexbin") { ## HEXBIN ----
                  plot <- plot +
                    geom_hex(data = data, aes(x = X, y = Y, text = paste("Player:", player, "\nMin:", minute, "\nxG", xG)), bins = bins) +
                    scale_fill_continuous(type = "viridis") +
                    scale_size_continuous(range = c(0.5, 6)) +
                    geom_vline(xintercept = mean(data$X), color = colorLine, linetype = 2, linewidth = 1.5) +
                    geom_hline(yintercept = mean(data$Y), color = colorLine, linetype = 2, linewidth = 1.5) +
                    labs(
                      fill = "Count of Shots"
                    )
                }
              } else if (average_location == FALSE) {
                
                if (type == "point" || type == "") {
                  
                  if (highlight_goals == FALSE || highlight_goals == "") {
                    plot <- plot +
                      geom_point(data = data, aes(x = X, y = Y, size = xG, color = result, text = paste("Player:", player, "\nMin:", minute, "\nxG", xG)), alpha = 0.7, stroke = 0.5) +
                      scale_size_continuous(range = c(0.5, 6)) +
                      labs(
                        color = "Result & xG of Shot",
                        size = ""
                      )
                  } else if (highlight_goals == TRUE) {
                    
                    plot <- plot +
                      geom_point(data = data, aes(x = X, y = Y, size = xG, fill = isGoal, text = paste("Player:", player, "\nMin:", minute, "\nxG", xG)), color = color_b, shape = 21, alpha = 0.7, stroke = 0.5) +
                      scale_fill_manual(values = fill_Goal) +
                      scale_size_continuous(range = c(0.5, 6)) +
                      labs(
                        fill = "Result & xG of Shot",
                        size = ""
                      )
                  } 
                } else if (type == "density") {
                  plot <- plot +
                    stat_density_2d(data = data, aes(x = X, y = Y, fill = ..level..), geom = "polygon", alpha = 0.7) +
                    scale_fill_gradient(high = teamColor, low = "#01141D") +
                    scale_size_continuous(range = c(0.5, 6)) +
                    labs(fill = "xG")
                  
                  
                } else if (type == "hexbin") {
                  plot <- plot +
                    geom_hex(data = data, aes(x = X, y = Y, text = paste("Player:", player, "\nMin:", minute, "\nxG", xG)), bins = bins) +
                    scale_fill_continuous(type = "viridis") +
                    scale_size_continuous(range = c(0.5, 6)) +
                    labs(
                      fill = "Count of Shots"
                    )
                } 
              }
              # Make Half pitch  
              plot <- plot +
                coord_flip(xlim = c(50, 100),
                           ylim = c(100, 0))
              # formatting  
              plot <- plot +
                labs(title = shot_name, 
                     subtitle = fixture_name,
                     caption = My_caption,
                     #color = colorText,
                     #size = "xG & Result of Shot"
                     ) +
                
                theme(legend.position = "bottom",
                      legend.direction = "horizontal",
                      legend.background = element_rect(fill = "snow"),
                      legend.title = element_text(colour = colorText, face = "bold"),
                      legend.text = element_text(colour = colorText, size = 10),
                      legend.key = element_rect(fill = "snow"),
                      plot.caption = element_markdown(),
                      plot.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
                      panel.background = element_rect(colour = "snow", fill = "snow"),
                      plot.title = element_text(colour = colorText, hjust = 0, size = 14, face = "bold"),
                      plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = colorText, hjust = 0, size = 10))
              
              # wrap or not
              if (wrap == "Player") {
                #divide stats by player
                player_stats <- data %>%
                  group_by(player) %>%
                  summarize(
                    total_xG = sum(xG),
                    total_goal = sum(result == "Goal"),
                    xg_sot = total_xG / n(),
                    total_shots = n(),
                    SOT = sum(result == "Goal" | result == "SavedShot")
                  )

                plot <- plot +
                  facet_wrap(~player) +
                  theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill = teamColor, color = "black", linetype = "solid", linewidth = 1),
                        strip.text = element_text(size = 10, colour = "white"))
                
                plot <- plot +
                  geom_point(x = 54, y = 89.45, size = 5, color = colorText, shape = 21, fill = fill_b, stroke = 0.5) +
                  geom_text(data = player_stats, aes(x = 54, y = 89.45, label = format(round(total_xG, 2))), color = color_b, size = 2) +
                  geom_text(x = 62, y = 89.45, label = "xG", color = colorText, size = 2) +
                  
                  geom_point(x = 54, y = 71.05, size = 5, color = colorText, shape = 21, fill = fill_b, stroke = 0.5) +
                  geom_text(data = player_stats, aes(x = 54, y = 71.05, label = format(round(SOT, 2))), color = color_b, size = 2) +
                  geom_text(x = 62, y = 71.05, label = "SOT", color = colorText, size = 2) +
                  
                  geom_point(x = 54, y = 50, size = 5, color = colorText, shape = 21, fill = fill_b, stroke = 0.5) +
                  geom_text(data = player_stats, aes(x = 54, y = 50, label = format(round(total_shots, 2))), color = color_b, size = 2) +
                  geom_text(x = 62, y = 50, label = "Shots", color = colorText, size = 2) +
                  
                  geom_point(x = 54, y = 28.95, size = 5, color = colorText, shape = 21, fill = fill_b, stroke = 0.5) +
                  geom_text(data = player_stats, aes(x = 54, y = 28.95, label = format(round(xg_sot, 2))), color = color_b, size = 2) +
                  geom_text(x = 62, y = 28.95, label = "xG/Shot", color = colorText, size = 2) +
                  
                  geom_point(x = 54, y = 10.55, size = 5, color = colorText, shape = 21, fill = fill_b, stroke = 0.5) +
                  geom_text(data = player_stats, aes(x = 54, y = 10.55, label = format(round(total_goal, 2))), color = color_b, size = 2) +
                  geom_text(x = 62, y = 10.55, label = "Goals", color = colorText, size = 2)
                
                } else if (wrap == "Time") {
                  
                  #divide stats by time period
                  GPeriod_stats <- data %>%
                    group_by(Game_Period) %>%
                    summarize(
                      total_xG = sum(xG),
                      total_goal = sum(result == "Goal"),
                      xg_sot = total_xG / n(),
                      total_shots = n(),
                      SOT = sum(result == "Goal" | result == "SavedShot")
                    )
                  
                  
                    plot <- plot +
                      
                      facet_wrap(~ Game_Period) +
                      theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill = teamColor, color = "black", linetype = "solid", linewidth = 1),
                            strip.text = element_text(size = 10, colour = "white")) 
                    
                    plot <- plot +
                    geom_point(x = 54, y = 89.45, size = 5, color = colorText, shape = 21, fill = fill_b, stroke = 0.5) +
                      geom_text(data = GPeriod_stats, aes(x = 54, y = 89.45, label = format(round(total_xG, 2))), color = color_b, size = 2) +
                      geom_text(x = 62, y = 89.45, label = "xG", color = colorText, size = 2) +
                      
                      geom_point(x = 54, y = 71.05, size = 5, color = colorText, shape = 21, fill = fill_b, stroke = 0.5) +
                      geom_text(data = GPeriod_stats, aes(x = 54, y = 71.05, label = format(round(SOT, 2))), color = color_b, size = 2) +
                      geom_text(x = 62, y = 71.05, label = "SOT", color = colorText, size = 2) +
                      
                      geom_point(x = 54, y = 50, size = 5, color = colorText, shape = 21, fill = fill_b, stroke = 0.5) +
                      geom_text(data = GPeriod_stats, aes(x = 54, y = 50, label = format(round(total_shots, 2))), color = color_b, size = 2) +
                      geom_text(x = 62, y = 50, label = "Shots", color = colorText, size = 2) +
                      
                      geom_point(x = 54, y = 28.95, size = 5, color = colorText, shape = 21, fill = fill_b, stroke = 0.5) +
                      geom_text(data = GPeriod_stats, aes(x = 54, y = 28.95, label = format(round(xg_sot, 2))), color = color_b, size = 2) +
                      geom_text(x = 62, y = 28.95, label = "xG/Shot", color = colorText, size = 2) +
                      
                      geom_point(x = 54, y = 10.55, size = 5, color = colorText, shape = 21, fill = fill_b, stroke = 0.5) +
                      geom_text(data = GPeriod_stats, aes(x = 54, y = 10.55, label = format(round(total_goal, 2))), color = color_b, size = 2) +
                      geom_text(x = 62, y = 10.55, label = "Goals", color = colorText, size = 2)
                  
              } else if (wrap == "") {
                total_xG <- sum(data$xG)
                total_goal <- sum(data$result == "Goal")
                xg_sot <- total_xG / nrow(data)
                total_shots <- nrow(data)
                SOT <- sum(data$result == "Goal" | data$result == "SavedShot")
                
                plot <- plot +
                  geom_point(x = 54, y = 89.45, size = 12, color = colorText, shape = 21, fill = fill_b, stroke = 0.5) +
                  geom_text(x = 54, y = 89.45, label = format(round(total_xG, 2)), color = color_b, size = 3) +
                  geom_text(x = 60, y = 89.45, label = "Total xG", color = colorText, size = 3) +
                  geom_point(x = 54, y = 71.05, size = 12, color = colorText, shape = 21, fill = fill_b, stroke = 0.5) +
                  geom_text(x = 54, y = 71.05, label = format(round(SOT, 2)), color = color_b, size = 3) +
                  geom_text(x = 60, y = 71.05, label = "SOT", color = colorText, size = 3) +
                  geom_point(x = 54, y = 50, size = 12, color = colorText, shape = 21, fill = fill_b, stroke = 0.5) +
                  geom_text(x = 54, y = 50, label = format(round(total_shots, 2)), color = color_b, size = 3) +
                  geom_text(x = 60, y = 50, label = "Total Shots", color = colorText, size = 3) +  
                  geom_point(x = 54, y = 28.95, size = 12, color = colorText, shape = 21, fill = fill_b, stroke = 0.5) +
                  geom_text(x = 54, y = 28.95, label = format(round(xg_sot, 2)), color = color_b, size = 3) +
                  geom_text(x = 60, y = 28.95, label = "xG/Shot", color = colorText, size = 3) +
                  geom_point(x = 54, y = 10.55, size = 12, color = colorText, shape = 21, fill = fill_b, stroke = 0.5) +
                  geom_text(x = 54, y = 10.55, label = format(round(total_goal, 2)), color = color_b, size = 3) +
                  geom_text(x = 60, y = 10.55, label = "Goals", color = colorText, size = 3)
              
                Finalplot <- plot
              }
              
              # logo or not
              if (logo == "Yes") {
                
                # annotate plot
                Finalplot <- ggdraw() +
                  draw_plot(plot, x = 0, y = 0, width = 1, height = , scale = 1) +
                  draw_image(logo_AI,  x = 0.42, y = 0.45, scale = 0.07) 
                
              } else if (logo == "") {
                
                Finalplot <- plot
              }
              
              return(Finalplot)
              
             } else 
               {
              ## add WARNING that there were no rows in the data frame passed into function??
              return(plot)
    }
    }
  }

```
```{r}
#load data if needed
fileName <- paste0("~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/Data Sets/Understat/LFC_shots_EPL2324.xlsx")

#load back in if need to check goal times overlap
LFC_Understat_shots_EPL2324 <- read_xlsx(fileName)

#Shot plot team match
#shot map LFC data
LFC_shotsUS <- LFC_Understat_shots_EPL2324 

LFC_shotsUS <- LFC_shotsUS %>%
  filter(match_id == MatchIdUS & away_team == Match_LFC & home_away == "a")

#shot map OPPO data
Oppo_shotsUS <- LFC_Understat_shots_EPL2324 

Oppo_shotsUS <- Oppo_shotsUS %>%
  filter(match_id == MatchIdUS & home_team == Match_Oppo & home_away == "h")

```

## Row 1 {height = "110%"}

```{r}
#shot map
LFC_S_plot <- plot_shot_AI(LFC_shotsUS, highlight_goals = TRUE, average_location = FALSE, mapType = LFCHA, mapName = "Liverpool", teamColor = Color_LFC, matchDate = Game_date, matchFixture = Match_Fixture, dataSource = "UnderStat", logo = "", wrap = "")

LFC_S_plot_I <- ggplotly(LFC_S_plot, tooltip = "text")
LFC_S_plot_I

```

```{r}
OPPO_S_plot <- plot_shot_AI(Oppo_shotsUS, highlight_goals = TRUE, average_location = FALSE, mapType = OppoHA,  mapName = Match_Oppo, teamColor = Color_Oppo, matchDate = Game_date, matchFixture = Match_Fixture, dataSource = "UnderStat")
OPPO_S_plot_I <- ggplotly(OPPO_S_plot, tooltip = "text")
OPPO_S_plot_I

```

## Row 2  {height = "110%"}

```{r}
#|height: 110%
LFC_S_plotW <- plot_shot_AI(LFC_shotsUS, highlight_goals = TRUE, average_location = FALSE, mapType = LFCHA, mapName = "Liverpool", teamColor = Color_LFC, matchDate = Game_date, matchFixture = Match_Fixture, dataSource = "UnderStat", logo = "", wrap = "Player")
LFC_S_plotW_I <- ggplotly(LFC_S_plotW, tooltip = "text")
LFC_S_plotW_I


```

```{r}
#|height: 110%
OPPO_S_plotW <- plot_shot_AI(Oppo_shotsUS, highlight_goals = TRUE, average_location = FALSE, mapType = OppoHA,  mapName = Match_Oppo, teamColor = Color_Oppo, matchDate = Game_date, matchFixture = Match_Fixture, dataSource = "UnderStat", wrap = "Player")

OPPO_S_plotW_I <- ggplotly(OPPO_S_plotW, tooltip = "text")
OPPO_S_plotW_I


```

## Row 3 {height = "110%"}

```{r}
#|height: 110%
LFC_S_plotWT <- plot_shot_AI(LFC_shotsUS, highlight_goals = TRUE, average_location = FALSE, mapType = LFCHA, mapName = "Liverpool", teamColor = Color_LFC, matchDate = Game_date, matchFixture = Match_Fixture, dataSource = "UnderStat", logo = "", wrap = "Time")
LFC_S_plotWT_I <- ggplotly(LFC_S_plotWT, tooltip = "text")
LFC_S_plotWT_I


```

```{r}
#|height: 110%
OPPO_S_plotWT <- plot_shot_AI(Oppo_shotsUS, highlight_goals = TRUE, average_location = FALSE, mapType = OppoHA,  mapName = Match_Oppo, teamColor = Color_Oppo, matchDate = Game_date, matchFixture = Match_Fixture, dataSource = "UnderStat", wrap = "Time")

OPPO_S_plotWT_I <- ggplotly(OPPO_S_plotWT, tooltip = "text")
OPPO_S_plotWT_I


```
